content.text:
## #3 Fitness Matrix — xong, và nó **xác nhận sạch các giả thuyết trong memory**

`fitness_matrix.py` map mỗi tháng → DT5G state lúc hình thành, tính edge (IC + L/S spread + hit) cho từng (signal × state). Panel 2014–26, 147 tháng. (Cột phải "L/S spread oriented" là view fitness đúng — dương = chiến lược *kiếm tiền*; cột trái IC tô theo dấu IC nên value hiện đỏ dù có lãi.)

**Bốn quy luật môi trường (đọc từ spread %):**

| Họ chiến lược | CRISIS | BEAR | NEUTRAL | BULL | Đọc |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **VALUE (PB/PE)** | +6.5/+7.2 | +8.3/+3.8 | +5.0/+3.8 | **+14.2/+8.7** | All-weather, mạnh nhất ở 2 cực |
| **QUALITY (ROIC/ROE)** | **+4.6/+4.6** | ~0 | ~0 | **−4.4/−3.3** | Chỉ sống ở CRISIS, ÂM ở BULL |
| **MOMENTUM (MA200/RSI)** | **−2.8/0** | ~0 | +5.8/+6.0 | +5.0/+6.9 | Good-times; ĐẢO sang mean-rev ở CRISIS |
| **Flow/Position** | âm | âm | + | + | Theo momentum |

→ Khớp đúng từng câu memory: **"CRISIS = regime DUY NHẤT quality thắng junk"** (ROIC +0.108\*, ROE +0.118\* chỉ ở CRISIS), **"FA edge ZERO in BULL"** (quality âm ở BULL), và momentum đảo dấu ở CRISIS = chính cái crisis-capitulation (mua oversold = anti-momentum). Value là xương sống mọi mùa, đặc biệt khủng ở BULL (+14% cho cổ rẻ).

**Phát hiện lớn nhất — synthesis #1 × #3 (đây là chỗ AMH thật sự thay đổi cách phân bổ):**

State hiện tại = **NEUTRAL**. Fitness Matrix (prior *through-cycle*) xếp hạng: momentum top (mom_200 IC +0.091 t4.4, D_RSI +0.087 t5.3), rồi value. **NHƯNG** Edge Health Monitor (#1, *live*) báo momentum **FLIPPED 12 tháng qua**. Hai cái không mâu thuẫn — chúng là **hai tầng khác nhau**:

> **Fitness Matrix = "thường thì cái gì hợp với state này" (prior). Edge Health Monitor = "cái gì đang thật sự chạy LÚC NÀY" (override).**

Kết hợp: ở NEUTRAL momentum *bình thường* fit, nhưng đang ở pha inefficiency → **hạ trọng số momentum NGAY, nghiêng value** (cái #1 xác nhận vẫn healthy). Đây chính là cơ chế adaptive của Lo: dùng bản đồ qua-chu-kỳ làm nền, rồi để tín hiệu sống điều chỉnh. **Không có #1, anh sẽ tin momentum theo Matrix và ăn đòn; không có #3, anh không biết NEUTRAL lẽ ra nên có momentum.**

**Playbook phân bổ theo state** (đưa được vào router cấp vốn):
- **CRISIS** → quality (ROIC/ROE) + value (PE) + capitulation mean-reversion; **TẮT momentum**.
- **BEAR** → value thuần (PB/PE); tránh flow/momentum.
- **NEUTRAL** → momentum + value (khi #1 xác nhận momentum sống); quality ngủ.
- **BULL** → value (cổ rẻ +14%!) + momentum; **giảm quality** (junk rally).

**Caveat (đọc đúng tầm):** đây là *prior in-sample full-history*, KHÔNG phải walk-forward backtest — dùng làm **bản đồ điều kiện**, kết hợp #1 live, không phải hệ alpha độc lập (memory đã cảnh báo "state in-sample optimistic"). BEAR mỏng (12 tháng), EXBULL (4 tháng) bị loại.

Đang lưu memory. Sau #3 còn **#4 Ecology Dashboard** (dispersion + breadth + sentiment) và **#5 Biodiversity test**. Tiếp #4 chứ?

input.content:
---
name: fitness_matrix_amh3_2026
description: Fitness Matrix (AMH #3) — strategy edge × DT5G-state grid; validates quality=CRISIS-only, momentum=good-times (inverts CRISIS), value=all-weather. Key = #1×#3 synthesis (prior vs live).
metadata:
  type: project
---

**AMH proposal #3 — Fitness Matrix** (`fitness_matrix.py`, [REDACTED]09). Turns scattered regime-dependent findings into ONE grid [signal × DT5G market-state] for regime-conditional allocation. Each month → modal DT5G state at formation; per (signal×state) compute mean fwd-3M IC + long/short quintile spread (oriented + = profitable) + t-stat + hit. Panel 2014-26 (147 months) from `data/edge_panel.csv` + `data/dt5g_vnindex.csv`. Outputs `data/fitness_matrix_{ic,spread}.csv`, `fitness_matrix.png`. Months/state: CRISIS 24, BEAR 12, NEUTRAL 88, BULL 19, EXBULL 4 (dropped, <6).

**Four environment laws (L/S spread %, validates memory):**
- **VALUE (PB/PE) = all-weather, strongest at extremes**: PB CRISIS +6.5 / BEAR +8.3 / NEUTRAL +5.0 / **BULL +14.2**; PE CRISIS +7.2 / BULL +8.7. The backbone edge every state.
- **QUALITY (ROIC5Y/ROE_Min5Y) = CRISIS-ONLY**: ROIC +0.108\* CRISIS but ~0 elsewhere; ROE +0.118\* CRISIS, **NEGATIVE in BULL** (ROIC −4.4, ROE −3.3). Exactly validates "CRISIS = only regime quality beats junk" + "FA edge ZERO in BULL" ([[fa_layer_ic_audit_2026]]). Quality = flight-to-quality insurance, only pays when it matters.
- **MOMENTUM (mom_200/D_RSI) = good-times only, INVERTS in CRISIS**: NEUTRAL +5.8/+6.0, BULL +5.0/+6.9, but CRISIS −2.8/0 (mean-reversion). The CRISIS inversion IS the capitulation-buy edge ([[dt5g_8l_crisis_capitulation_2026]], buy oversold = anti-momentum).
- **Flow/Position** track momentum (+ in NEUTRAL/BULL, − in CRISIS/BEAR).

**HEADLINE — the #1×#3 synthesis (this is where AMH changes allocation):**
Fitness Matrix = the THROUGH-CYCLE PRIOR ("what usually fits this state"). Edge Health Monitor (#1) = the LIVE OVERRIDE ("what's actually working now"). They are two layers, not rivals. Current state = NEUTRAL → Matrix ranks momentum top (mom_200 t4.4, D_RSI t5.3) + value; BUT #1 shows momentum FLIPPED last-12M → **down-weight momentum NOW, lean value (still healthy per #1)**. Without #1 you'd trust the Matrix and get hit; without #3 you wouldn't know NEUTRAL should normally carry momentum. = Lo's adaptive mechanism: cyclical map as base, live signal adjusts.

**Allocation playbook per state**: CRISIS→quality+value+capitulation-meanrev, momentum OFF. BEAR→pure value, avoid flow/mom. NEUTRAL→momentum+value (when #1 confirms mom alive), quality dormant. BULL→value(huge)+momentum, cut quality.

**Caveat**: in-sample full-history PRIOR, NOT walk-forward — use as a conditioning MAP combined with live #1, not a standalone alpha (memory: "state in-sample optimistic"). BEAR thin (12mo), EXBULL dropped. Decision metrics note (user Q): Sharpe+Calmar = primary deciding pair (least redundant: everyday-vol vs worst-case); Sortino = reported + asymmetry flag (high Sortino/Sharpe ratio = favorable skew) but noisy in small samples, never override. Fitness cells use IC/spread/hit (cross-sectional), not NAV-path ratios.

AMH roadmap: #1 Edge Health ✅ → #2 Vol-target ✅(rejected) → **#3 Fitness Matrix ✅** → #4 Ecology Dashboard → #5 Biodiversity test.

content.text:
Sang **#4 — Ecology Dashboard**. Nguyên lý AMH (Lo): *đám đông KHÔN khi đa dạng, ĐIÊN khi đồng nhất*; bong bóng/sụp đổ = lúc đa dạng quan điểm sụp về một phía. Đo hệ sinh thái thị trường theo 3 trục: **(A) độ lớn cơ hội** (dispersion), **(B) độ đồng nhất đám đông** (breadth + co-movement), **(C) sentiment cực đoan** (panic/euphoria). Anh đã có sẵn các cảm biến rời (breadth trong DT5G, capitulation, pb_z) — #4 gom thành một dashboard + validate rằng cực đoan báo đảo chiều.

Trước hết pull daily aggregate từ `ticker_prune`:

input.command:
cd "/c/Users/hotro/OneDrive/Pictures/Documents/WorkingClaude" && bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=csv --max_rows=5000 '
WITH base AS (
  SELECT t.time, t.ticker,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(t.Close, NULLIF(t.Close_T1,0)) - 1 AS ret,
    IF(t.Close > t.MA200, 1, 0) AS a200,
    IF(t.Close > t.MA50, 1, 0) AS a50,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(t.PB - t.PB_MA5Y, NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0)) AS pb_z,
    t.D_RSI, t.VNINDEX_RSI, t.VNINDEX
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t
  WHERE t.time >= "2014-01-01" AND t.ticker != "VNINDEX"
    AND COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)*t.Volume >= 1e9
    AND t.MA200 IS NOT NULL AND t.Close_T1 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT b.time,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG(b.a200),4) AS breadth200,
  ROUND(AVG(b.a50),4) AS breadth50,
  ROUND(STDDEV(b.ret),5) AS disp,
  ROUND(ABS(ANY_VALUE(b.VNINDEX) / NULLIF(LAG(ANY_VALUE(b.VNINDEX)) OVER (ORDER BY b.time),0) - 1),5) AS idx_absret,
  ROUND(APPROX_QUANTILES(b.pb_z, 100)[OFFSET(50)],3) AS pbz_med,
  ROUND(AVG(IF(b.D_RSI<0.3,1.0,0)),4) AS pct_oversold,
  ROUND(AVG(IF(b.D_RSI>0.7,1.0,0)),4) AS pct_overbought,
  ROUND(ANY_VALUE(b.VNINDEX_RSI),4) AS vnindex_rsi,
  ANY_VALUE(b.VNINDEX) AS vnindex
FROM base AS b
GROUP BY b.time
ORDER BY b.time
' > data/ecology_panel.csv && wc -l data/ecology_panel.csv && head -2 data/ecology_panel.csv && tail -1 data/ecology_panel.csv

cd "/c/Users/hotro/OneDrive/Pictures/Documents/WorkingClaude" && bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=csv --max_rows=5000 '
WITH base AS (
  SELECT t.time,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(t.Close, NULLIF(t.Close_T1,0)) - 1 AS ret,
    IF(t.Close > t.MA200, 1, 0) AS a200,
    IF(t.Close > t.MA50, 1, 0) AS a50,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(t.PB - t.PB_MA5Y, NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0)) AS pb_z,
    t.D_RSI, t.VNINDEX_RSI, t.VNINDEX
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t
  WHERE t.time >= "2014-01-01" AND t.ticker != "VNINDEX"
    AND COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)*t.Volume >= 1e9
    AND t.MA200 IS NOT NULL AND t.Close_T1 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT b.time, COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG(b.a200),4) AS breadth200,
  ROUND(AVG(b.a50),4) AS breadth50,
  ROUND(STDDEV(b.ret),5) AS disp,
  ROUND(APPROX_QUANTILES(b.pb_z, 100)[OFFSET(50)],3) AS pbz_med,
  ROUND(AVG(IF(b.D_RSI<0.3,1.0,0)),4) AS pct_oversold,
  ROUND(AVG(IF(b.D_RSI>0.7,1.0,0)),4) AS pct_overbought,
  ROUND(ANY_VALUE(b.VNINDEX_RSI),4) AS vnindex_rsi,
  ANY_VALUE(b.VNINDEX) AS vnindex
FROM base AS b GROUP BY b.time ORDER BY b.time
' 2>&1 | head -20

input.content:
"""
Ecology Dashboard (AMH proposal #4)
===================================
AMH (Lo): crowds are WISE when diverse, MAD when uniform. Bubbles & crashes =
diversity of opinion collapsing to one side. This gauges the market ECOLOGY along
three axes and tests the core claim that crowd-uniformity extremes precede
reversals (mean-reversion of sentiment).

Axes (daily, liquid ticker_prune universe, causal):
  A. OPPORTUNITY  — cross-sectional return dispersion (wide = stock-picker's
                    market / rich edge set; narrow = macro-driven / crowded)
  B. UNIFORMITY   — breadth extremity |breadth-0.5|*2 (0 balanced/diverse,
                    1 everyone on one side) ; + low dispersion reinforces
  C. SENTIMENT    — directional mood (+euphoria / -panic) from breadth,
                    overbought-minus-oversold, and median PB_z (valuation greed)
  MADNESS = |mood| : distance from neutral, i.e. how far the crowd has herded.
  DIVERGENCE      — price up while breadth weak (late-cycle topping tell).

Validation: forward VNINDEX return by mood decile -> contrarian monotonicity
confirms "uniformity precedes reversal".

Inputs : data/ecology_panel.csv (breadth/disp/sentiment), data/dt5g_vnindex.csv (state+px)
Outputs: data/ecology_dashboard.csv, ecology_dashboard.png, data/ecology_now.md
Run: python ecology_dashboard.py
"""
import sys
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
ECO = WORKDIR + r"\data\ecology_panel.csv"
STATEF = WORKDIR + r"\data\dt5g_vnindex.csv"
WIN = 504          # rolling normalization window (~2y), causal
STATE_LBL = {1: "CRISIS", 2: "BEAR", 3: "NEUTRAL", 4: "BULL", 5: "EXBULL"}


def rz(s, win=WIN):
    """Causal rolling z-score."""
    m = s.rolling(win, min_periods=120).mean()
    sd = s.rolling(win, min_periods=120).std()
    return (s - m) / sd


def rpct(s, win=WIN):
    """Causal rolling percentile rank (0-1)."""
    return s.rolling(win, min_periods=120).apply(
        lambda x: (x.iloc[-1] >= x).mean(), raw=False)


def load():
    e = pd.read_csv(ECO, parse_dates=["time"])
    st = pd.read_csv(STATEF, parse_dates=["time"])[["time", "state", "vnindex"]]
    df = e.merge(st, on="time", how="left").sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
    df["disp_s"] = df["disp"].rolling(10).mean()
    # Axis A: opportunity = dispersion percentile
    df["opportunity"] = rpct(df["disp_s"])
    # Axis B: uniformity = breadth extremity (+ low-dispersion reinforcement)
    df["breadth_extremity"] = (df["breadth200"] - 0.5).abs() * 2
    df["uniformity"] = (df["breadth_extremity"] + (1 - df["opportunity"])) / 2
    # Axis C: directional mood (+euphoria / -panic)
    df["mood"] = (rz(df["breadth200"]) + rz(df["pct_overbought"] - df["pct_oversold"])
                  + rz(df["pbz_med"])) / 3.0
    df["madness"] = df["mood"].abs()
    # price-breadth divergence: index 60d up while breadth below median
    df["idx_ret60"] = df["vnindex"].pct_change(60)
    df["divergence"] = np.where((df["idx_ret60"] > 0) & (df["breadth200"] < 0.5),
                                (0.5 - df["breadth200"]) * np.sign(df["idx_ret60"]), 0.0)
    # forward VNINDEX returns for validation
    df["fwd20"] = df["vnindex"].shift(-20) / df["vnindex"] - 1
    df["fwd60"] = df["vnindex"].shift(-60) / df["vnindex"] - 1
    return df


def validate(df):
    print("\n=== VALIDATION: forward VNINDEX return by MOOD decile (contrarian => uniformity precedes reversal) ===")
    d = df.dropna(subset=["mood", "fwd60"]).copy()
    d["dec"] = pd.qcut(d["mood"], 10, labels=False)
    g = d.groupby("dec").agg(mood=("mood", "mean"),
                             fwd20=("fwd20", "mean"), fwd60=("fwd60", "mean"),
                             win60=("fwd60", lambda x: (x > 0).mean()), n=("fwd60", "size"))
    g["mood"] = g["mood"].round(2); g[["fwd20", "fwd60", "win60"]] = (g[["fwd20", "fwd60", "win60"]] * 100).round(1)
    print(g.to_string())
    lo, hi = g.loc[0], g.loc[9]
    print(f"\n  PANIC (decile 0, mood {lo['mood']:.2f}):    fwd60 = {lo['fwd60']:+.1f}%  win {lo['win60']:.0f}%")
    print(f"  EUPHORIA (decile 9, mood {hi['mood']:.2f}): fwd60 = {hi['fwd60']:+.1f}%  win {hi['win60']:.0f}%")
    print(f"  contrarian spread (panic - euphoria) fwd60 = {lo['fwd60']-hi['fwd60']:+.1f}pp")


def now_block(df):
    r = df.iloc[-1]
    op_p = r["opportunity"]; mood = r["mood"]
    mood_p = (df["mood"].dropna() <= mood).mean()
    lines = []
    lines.append(f"🌊 *Ecology Dashboard* (AMH#4, {r['time'].date()}, DT5G={STATE_LBL.get(r['state'],'?')})")
    lines.append(f"Breadth: {r['breadth200']*100:.0f}% >MA200 | {r['breadth50']*100:.0f}% >MA50  "
                 f"(n={int(r['n'])})")
    lines.append(f"A Opportunity (dispersion pctile): {op_p*100:.0f}%  "
                 f"({'RICH stock-pickers' if op_p>0.6 else 'CROWDED/macro' if op_p<0.4 else 'normal'})")
    lines.append(f"B Uniformity: {r['uniformity']*100:.0f}%  (breadth-extremity {r['breadth_extremity']*100:.0f}%)")
    lines.append(f"C Mood: {mood:+.2f} (pctile {mood_p*100:.0f}%) -> "
                 f"{'EUPHORIA' if mood>0.7 else 'PANIC' if mood<-0.7 else 'neutral'}  | "
                 f"madness {r['madness']:.2f} | pb_z med {r['pbz_med']:+.2f}")
    div = r["divergence"]
    if div > 0.05:
        lines.append(f"⚠️ DIVERGENCE: index up 60d but breadth only {r['breadth200']*100:.0f}% "
                     f"(narrow leadership, late-cycle tell)")
    return "\n".join(lines)


def main():
    df = load()
    print(f"Ecology panel: {df['time'].min().date()} -> {df['time'].max().date()} | {len(df)} sessions")
    validate(df)
    block = now_block(df)
    print("\n--- NOW (data/ecology_now.md) ---\n" + block)
    with open(WORKDIR + r"\data\ecology_now.md", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(block)
    df.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\ecology_dashboard.csv", index=False)

    # ---- plot ----
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=(14, 12), sharex=True)
    ax = axes[0]
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["vnindex"], color="black", lw=1)
    ax.set_yscale("log"); ax.set_ylabel("VNINDEX"); ax.set_title("Ecology Dashboard (AMH #4)")
    ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax = axes[1]
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["breadth200"], color="tab:blue", lw=1, label="breadth >MA200")
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["breadth50"], color="tab:cyan", lw=0.7, alpha=0.7, label="breadth >MA50")
    ax.axhline(0.5, color="gray", ls="--", lw=0.8); ax.set_ylabel("breadth"); ax.legend(fontsize=8); ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax = axes[2]
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["opportunity"], color="tab:green", lw=1, label="A: opportunity (disp pctile)")
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["uniformity"], color="tab:red", lw=1, label="B: uniformity")
    ax.set_ylabel("A / B"); ax.legend(fontsize=8); ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax = axes[3]
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["mood"], color="tab:purple", lw=1, label="C: mood (+euph/-panic)")
    ax.axhline(0, color="gray", lw=0.8)
    ax.fill_between(df["time"], 0, df["mood"], where=(df["mood"] > 0), color="tab:orange", alpha=0.2)
    ax.fill_between(df["time"], 0, df["mood"], where=(df["mood"] < 0), color="tab:blue", alpha=0.2)
    ax.set_ylabel("mood"); ax.legend(fontsize=8); ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(WORKDIR + r"\ecology_dashboard.png", dpi=110)
    print("\nSaved: ecology_dashboard.png | data/ecology_dashboard.csv | data/ecology_now.md")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

toolUseResult.originalFile:
"""
Ecology Dashboard (AMH proposal #4)
===================================
AMH (Lo): crowds are WISE when diverse, MAD when uniform. Bubbles & crashes =
diversity of opinion collapsing to one side. This gauges the market ECOLOGY along
three axes and tests the core claim that crowd-uniformity extremes precede
reversals (mean-reversion of sentiment).

Axes (daily, liquid ticker_prune universe, causal):
  A. OPPORTUNITY  — cross-sectional return dispersion (wide = stock-picker's
                    market / rich edge set; narrow = macro-driven / crowded)
  B. UNIFORMITY   — breadth extremity |breadth-0.5|*2 (0 balanced/diverse,
                    1 everyone on one side) ; + low dispersion reinforces
  C. SENTIMENT    — directional mood (+euphoria / -panic) from breadth,
                    overbought-minus-oversold, and median PB_z (valuation greed)
  MADNESS = |mood| : distance from neutral, i.e. how far the crowd has herded.
  DIVERGENCE      — price up while breadth weak (late-cycle topping tell).

Validation: forward VNINDEX return by mood decile -> contrarian monotonicity
confirms "uniformity precedes reversal".

Inputs : data/ecology_panel.csv (breadth/disp/sentiment), data/dt5g_vnindex.csv (state+px)
Outputs: data/ecology_dashboard.csv, ecology_dashboard.png, data/ecology_now.md
Run: python ecology_dashboard.py
"""
import sys
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
ECO = WORKDIR + r"\data\ecology_panel.csv"
STATEF = WORKDIR + r"\data\dt5g_vnindex.csv"
WIN = 504          # rolling normalization window (~2y), causal
STATE_LBL = {1: "CRISIS", 2: "BEAR", 3: "NEUTRAL", 4: "BULL", 5: "EXBULL"}


def rz(s, win=WIN):
    """Causal rolling z-score."""
    m = s.rolling(win, min_periods=120).mean()
    sd = s.rolling(win, min_periods=120).std()
    return (s - m) / sd


def rpct(s, win=WIN):
    """Causal rolling percentile rank (0-1)."""
    return s.rolling(win, min_periods=120).apply(
        lambda x: (x.iloc[-1] >= x).mean(), raw=False)


def load():
    e = pd.read_csv(ECO, parse_dates=["time"])
    st = pd.read_csv(STATEF, parse_dates=["time"])[["time", "state", "vnindex"]]
    df = e.merge(st, on="time", how="left").sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
    df["disp_s"] = df["disp"].rolling(10).mean()
    # Axis A: opportunity = dispersion percentile
    df["opportunity"] = rpct(df["disp_s"])
    # Axis B: uniformity = breadth extremity (+ low-dispersion reinforcement)
    df["breadth_extremity"] = (df["breadth200"] - 0.5).abs() * 2
    df["uniformity"] = (df["breadth_extremity"] + (1 - df["opportunity"])) / 2
    # Axis C: directional mood (+euphoria / -panic)
    df["mood"] = (rz(df["breadth200"]) + rz(df["pct_overbought"] - df["pct_oversold"])
                  + rz(df["pbz_med"])) / 3.0
    df["madness"] = df["mood"].abs()
    # price-breadth divergence: index 60d up while breadth below median
    df["idx_ret60"] = df["vnindex"].pct_change(60)
    df["divergence"] = np.where((df["idx_ret60"] > 0) & (df["breadth200"] < 0.5),
                                (0.5 - df["breadth200"]) * np.sign(df["idx_ret60"]), 0.0)
    # forward VNINDEX returns for validation
    df["fwd20"] = df["vnindex"].shift(-20) / df["vnindex"] - 1
    df["fwd60"] = df["vnindex"].shift(-60) / df["vnindex"] - 1
    return df


def validate(df):
    print("\n=== VALIDATION: forward VNINDEX return by MOOD decile (contrarian => uniformity precedes reversal) ===")
    d = df.dropna(subset=["mood", "fwd60"]).copy()
    d["dec"] = pd.qcut(d["mood"], 10, labels=False)
    g = d.groupby("dec").agg(mood=("mood", "mean"),
                             fwd20=("fwd20", "mean"), fwd60=("fwd60", "mean"),
                             win60=("fwd60", lambda x: (x > 0).mean()), n=("fwd60", "size"))
    g["mood"] = g["mood"].round(2); g[["fwd20", "fwd60", "win60"]] = (g[["fwd20", "fwd60", "win60"]] * 100).round(1)
    print(g.to_string())
    lo, hi = g.loc[0], g.loc[9]
    print(f"\n  PANIC (decile 0, mood {lo['mood']:.2f}):    fwd60 = {lo['fwd60']:+.1f}%  win {lo['win60']:.0f}%")
    print(f"  EUPHORIA (decile 9, mood {hi['mood']:.2f}): fwd60 = {hi['fwd60']:+.1f}%  win {hi['win60']:.0f}%")
    print(f"  contrarian spread (panic - euphoria) fwd60 = {lo['fwd60']-hi['fwd60']:+.1f}pp")


def now_block(df):
    r = df.iloc[-1]
    op_p = r["opportunity"]; mood = r["mood"]
    mood_p = (df["mood"].dropna() <= mood).mean()
    lines = []
    lines.append(f"🌊 *Ecology Dashboard* (AMH#4, {r['time'].date()}, DT5G={STATE_LBL.get(r['state'],'?')})")
    lines.append(f"Breadth: {r['breadth200']*100:.0f}% >MA200 | {r['breadth50']*100:.0f}% >MA50  "
                 f"(n={int(r['n'])})")
    lines.append(f"A Opportunity (dispersion pctile): {op_p*100:.0f}%  "
                 f"({'RICH stock-pickers' if op_p>0.6 else 'CROWDED/macro' if op_p<0.4 else 'normal'})")
    lines.append(f"B Uniformity: {r['uniformity']*100:.0f}%  (breadth-extremity {r['breadth_extremity']*100:.0f}%)")
    lines.append(f"C Mood: {mood:+.2f} (pctile {mood_p*100:.0f}%) -> "
                 f"{'EUPHORIA' if mood>0.7 else 'PANIC' if mood<-0.7 else 'neutral'}  | "
                 f"madness {r['madness']:.2f} | pb_z med {r['pbz_med']:+.2f}")
    div = r["divergence"]
    if div > 0.05:
        lines.append(f"⚠️ DIVERGENCE: index up 60d but breadth only {r['breadth200']*100:.0f}% "
                     f"(narrow leadership, late-cycle tell)")
    return "\n".join(lines)


def main():
    df = load()
    print(f"Ecology panel: {df['time'].min().date()} -> {df['time'].max().date()} | {len(df)} sessions")
    validate(df)
    block = now_block(df)
    print("\n--- NOW (data/ecology_now.md) ---\n" + block)
    with open(WORKDIR + r"\data\ecology_now.md", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(block)
    df.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\ecology_dashboard.csv", index=False)

    # ---- plot ----
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=(14, 12), sharex=True)
    ax = axes[0]
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["vnindex"], color="black", lw=1)
    ax.set_yscale("log"); ax.set_ylabel("VNINDEX"); ax.set_title("Ecology Dashboard (AMH #4)")
    ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax = axes[1]
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["breadth200"], color="tab:blue", lw=1, label="breadth >MA200")
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["breadth50"], color="tab:cyan", lw=0.7, alpha=0.7, label="breadth >MA50")
    ax.axhline(0.5, color="gray", ls="--", lw=0.8); ax.set_ylabel("breadth"); ax.legend(fontsize=8); ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax = axes[2]
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["opportunity"], color="tab:green", lw=1, label="A: opportunity (disp pctile)")
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["uniformity"], color="tab:red", lw=1, label="B: uniformity")
    ax.set_ylabel("A / B"); ax.legend(fontsize=8); ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    ax = axes[3]
    ax.plot(df["time"], df["mood"], color="tab:purple", lw=1, label="C: mood (+euph/-panic)")
    ax.axhline(0, color="gray", lw=0.8)
    ax.fill_between(df["time"], 0, df["mood"], where=(df["mood"] > 0), color="tab:orange", alpha=0.2)
    ax.fill_between(df["time"], 0, df["mood"], where=(df["mood"] < 0), color="tab:blue", alpha=0.2)
    ax.set_ylabel("mood"); ax.legend(fontsize=8); ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
    fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(WORKDIR + r"\ecology_dashboard.png", dpi=110)
    print("\nSaved: ecology_dashboard.png | data/ecology_dashboard.csv | data/ecology_now.md")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Dashboard works. **#4 complete** — and the validation delivered a counterintuitive, important result.

## #4 Ecology Dashboard — và nó **bác bỏ cách đọc AMH ngây thơ**

`ecology_dashboard.py` đo 3 trục hằng ngày (causal, universe `ticker_prune`): **A Opportunity** (dispersion pctile), **B Uniformity** (breadth extremity), **C Mood** (+euphoria/−panic từ breadth + overbought−oversold + pb_z), cộng cờ **Divergence** (giá lên / breadth yếu). Outputs `data/ecology_dashboard.csv`, `ecology_dashboard.png`, `data/ecology_now.md`.

**Validation lật ngược giả thuyết "fade đám đông điên":**

| Mood decile | fwd60 | win% |
|---|---|---|
| 0 (panic sâu −2.04) | +3.9% | 64% |
| 1–3 (bi quan nhẹ) | ~0–2% | 53–58% |
| 9 (euphoria +1.49) | **+8.2%** | **82%** |

Spread (panic − euphoria) = **−4.3pp** → ở tầm **thị trường / 60 ngày, mood là PROCYCLICAL (momentum), KHÔNG contrarian.** Euphoria → tiếp tục lên; bi quan → tiếp tục yếu. **Fade đám đông = sai** (anh sẽ short suốt con bò). Cú nảy contrarian **chỉ sống ở đuôi cực đoan nhất** (decile-0 +3.9% > bi-quan-nhẹ ~0–2%) **và cần điều kiện DT5G-CRISIS + washout** như #3/capitulation — không phải mood thấp diện rộng.

→ **Vai trò đúng của Ecology Dashboard: thước đo ĐỘ MONG MANH (fragility), không phải tín hiệu timing contrarian.** Madness cao + divergence = thị trường căng/dễ gãy → *không* "bán ngay" mà *siết kỷ luật rủi ro, tin cổng DT5G, giảm đòn bẩy, đòi quality*. Đọc **xuyên qua #3**: cùng một mood nghĩa khác nhau theo state (panic trong CRISIS = cơ hội capitulation; panic trong NEUTRAL = chỉ là yếu kéo dài).

**Hiện trạng ([REDACTED]08) = phân kỳ cuối chu kỳ kinh điển — đáng chú ý:**
- VNINDEX gần đỉnh (+60d dương) **nhưng** breadth chỉ **29% >MA200** (24% >MA50)
- Opportunity 26th pctile = **CROWDED/macro** (dispersion thấp, dẫn dắt hẹp — VIC-led như memory)
- Mood −1.50 (pctile 8% = **panic diện rộng**) trong khi pb_z index +0.11 (chỉ số hơi đắt)
- ⚠️ **Divergence flag bật**: chỉ số được megacap đỡ, đa số cổ phiếu đã trong gấu.

Đây là **rally mong manh**: hoặc breadth bắt kịp (lành), hoặc chỉ số hội tụ xuống breadth (đỉnh). Dashboard chỉ báo *độ mong manh*; DT5G + #1 quyết định *hành động*. Khớp đúng việc V4/V5 chảy máu (#1 momentum FLIP) — broad market đã yếu dù index đẹp.

Đang lưu memory. Còn **#5 — Biodiversity test** (quy tắc sàng lọc mọi strategy mới: nó có sống ở môi trường mà các strategy hiện có CHẾT không?). Sang #5 luôn chứ?

**AMH proposal #4 — Ecology Dashboard** (`ecology_dashboard.py`, [REDACTED]09). Gauges market ecology (Lo: crowds wise when diverse, mad when uniform) on 3 daily causal axes over liquid `ticker_prune`: **A Opportunity** = cross-sectional return dispersion pctile (wide=stock-picker's market, narrow=crowded/macro); **B Uniformity** = breadth extremity |breadth−0.5|×2 + low-dispersion; **C Mood** = +euphoria/−panic from z(breadth)+z(overbought−oversold)+z(pb_z_median); + **Divergence** flag (index up 60d while breadth<50%). Inputs `data/ecology_panel.csv` (BQ daily aggregate) + `data/dt5g_vnindex.csv`. Outputs `data/ecology_dashboard.csv`, `ecology_dashboard.png`, `data/ecology_now.md`.

**KEY FINDING — refutes the naive "fade the mad crowd" reading.** Forward-VNINDEX-by-mood-decile is **PROCYCLICAL (momentum), NOT contrarian** at the market/60d level: euphoria decile-9 fwd60 **+8.2%/82% win** >> panic decile-0 +3.9%/64%; spread (panic−euphoria) = **−4.3pp**. Fading the crowd is WRONG (you'd short the whole bull). The contrarian/capitulation kick lives ONLY in the extreme-tail decile-0 (+3.9% > mild-pessimism deciles 1-3 ~0-2%) AND needs the DT5G-CRISIS+washout conditioning from [[dt5g_8l_crisis_capitulation_2026]] / [[fitness_matrix_amh3_2026]]. → **Ecology Dashboard's role = a FRAGILITY gauge, not a timing/fade trigger**: high madness + divergence = market extended/fragile → tighten risk discipline, trust the DT5G de-risk gate, cut leverage, demand quality — NOT "sell now". Read THROUGH #3: same mood means different things per state (panic in CRISIS = capitulation opportunity; panic in NEUTRAL = just persistent weakness).

**Current ([REDACTED]08) = textbook late-cycle narrow-breadth divergence**: VNINDEX near highs (+60d) but breadth only **29% >MA200** / 24% >MA50; Opportunity 26th pctile (CROWDED/macro, narrow VIC-led leadership); Mood −1.50 (8th pctile, broad-market panic) while index pb_z +0.11 (slightly expensive). Divergence flag FIRES — fragile megacap-supported rally; broad market already in a bear. Consistent with V4/V5 momentum-bleed (#1 momentum FLIP) and the 8L-vs-VN30 grind. Forward: either breadth catches up (healthy) or index converges down (top).

AMH roadmap: #1 Edge Health ✅ → #2 Vol-target ✅(rejected) → #3 Fitness Matrix ✅ → **#4 Ecology Dashboard ✅** → #5 Biodiversity test (orthogonality screen for new strategies).

content.text:
Sang **#5 — Biodiversity test**, mảnh cuối. Nguyên lý AMH: đa dạng chiến lược = bền vững; một strategy mới chỉ đáng thêm nếu **trực giao** — sống ở môi trường mà book hiện có CHẾT. F-system FAIL (cùng cò súng DT5G), ORB PASS (trực giao daily). Tôi build một **công cụ tái dùng** chấm điểm biodiversity: corr + conditional-survival (kiếm tiền trong drawdown của book cũ?) + marginal Sharpe/Calmar uplift → PASS/FAIL.

Tôi dựng "hệ sinh thái" các style stream hằng tháng (long-short quintile, holding 1 tháng không chồng lấn) từ panel #1, lấy **MOMENTUM = book đương nhiệm (V4/V5)**, rồi test các style khác như ứng viên đa dạng hóa:

input.content:
"""
Biodiversity Test (AMH proposal #5)
===================================
AMH: a portfolio of strategies is robust the way an ecosystem is — through
DIVERSITY. A new strategy earns its place only if it is ORTHOGONAL to the
existing book: it must survive / profit in the environments where the incumbents
DIE. (F-system FAILED this — redundant with DT5G, "cùng cò súng"; ORB intraday
PASSED — orthogonal to the daily book.)

This is a reusable screen. Given an ecosystem of strategy return streams and a
candidate, it scores three things and returns PASS/FAIL:
  1. ORTHOGONALITY   — corr(candidate, incumbent) and corr(candidate, blend)
  2. SURVIVAL        — does the candidate make money in the incumbent's worst
                       months? (% of incumbent-down months where candidate > 0;
                       mean candidate return in incumbent's worst quartile)
  3. MARGINAL UPLIFT — Sharpe/Calmar of incumbent vs incumbent + w*candidate
                       (does adding it actually improve risk-adjusted return?)

Demo ecosystem: monthly long/short quintile style streams (1-month holding, non-
overlapping) built from data/edge_panel.csv — VALUE / MOMENTUM / QUALITY — plus a
DT5G market-timing stream. Incumbent = MOMENTUM (the V4/V5 core). Candidates: the
other styles + flow/position/mean-reversion.

Run: python biodiversity_test.py
"""
import sys
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PANEL = WORKDIR + r"\data\edge_panel.csv"
STATEF = WORKDIR + r"\data\dt5g_vnindex.csv"
FWD = "fwd_1m"          # 1-month holding -> non-overlapping monthly stream
QTILE = 0.20
MIN_NAMES = 25
STATE_W = {1: 0.0, 2: 0.2, 3: 0.7, 4: 1.0, 5: 1.3}

# style -> (column, drop-exact-zero[bank placeholder])
STYLES = {
    "VALUE_PB":   ("PB", False),
    "VALUE_PE":   ("PE", False),
    "MOMENTUM":   ("mom_200", False),
    "RSI":        ("D_RSI", False),
    "QUALITY_ROE":("ROE_Min5Y", True),
    "QUALITY_ROIC":("ROIC5Y", True),
    "FSCORE":     ("FSCORE", False),
    "FLOW_CMF":   ("D_CMF", False),
    "POSITION":   ("C_L1M", False),
    "PBZ":        ("pb_z", False),
}


def ls_stream(df, col, drop_zero):
    """Monthly long/short top-vs-bottom quintile return (1m holding), oriented +profit."""
    out = {}
    for ym, g in df.groupby("ym"):
        s = g[[col, FWD]].dropna()
        if drop_zero:
            s = s[s[col] != 0.0]
        if len(s) < MIN_NAMES or s[col].nunique() < 5:
            continue
        k = max(3, int(len(s) * QTILE))
        ss = s.sort_values(col)
        out[ym] = ss[FWD].iloc[-k:].mean() - ss[FWD].iloc[:k].mean()
    st = pd.Series(out).sort_index()
    # orient so positive = profitable (long the favorable end)
    if st.mean() < 0:
        st = -st
    return st


def ann(stream):
    mu = stream.mean() * 12
    sd = stream.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12)
    sharpe = mu / sd if sd > 0 else 0
    nav = (1 + stream).cumprod()
    dd = (nav / nav.cummax() - 1).min()
    calmar = mu / abs(dd) if dd < 0 else np.nan
    return dict(CAGR=mu, Vol=sd, Sharpe=sharpe, MaxDD=dd, Calmar=calmar)


def biodiversity(ecosystem, cand_name, cand, incumbent_name):
    """Score a candidate's biodiversity contribution. Returns a verdict dict."""
    inc = ecosystem[incumbent_name]
    blend = pd.DataFrame(ecosystem).mean(axis=1)   # equal-weight existing book
    idx = cand.index.intersection(inc.index)
    c, i, b = cand.loc[idx], inc.loc[idx], blend.loc[idx]
    corr_inc = c.corr(i)
    corr_blend = c.corr(b)
    # survival in incumbent's pain
    down = i < 0
    surv_rate = (c[down] > 0).mean() if down.sum() else np.nan
    worstq = i <= i.quantile(0.25)
    cand_in_worst = c[worstq].mean()
    inc_in_worst = i[worstq].mean()
    # marginal uplift: incumbent vs incumbent + 0.3*candidate (both rescaled later by user)
    w = 0.3
    combo = i + w * c
    s_inc = ann(i)["Sharpe"]; s_combo = ann(combo)["Sharpe"]
    cal_inc = ann(i)["Calmar"]; cal_combo = ann(combo)["Calmar"]
    sa = ann(c)   # standalone
    ortho = abs(corr_inc) < 0.30
    survives = (surv_rate is not np.nan) and surv_rate >= 0.50 and cand_in_worst > 0
    helps = (s_combo > s_inc) and sa["Sharpe"] > 0
    npass = sum([ortho, survives, helps])
    verdict = "PASS" if npass == 3 else ("PARTIAL" if npass == 2 else "FAIL")
    return dict(candidate=cand_name, corr_inc=round(corr_inc, 2), corr_blend=round(corr_blend, 2),
                surv_rate=round(surv_rate, 2), cand_in_incWorstQ=round(cand_in_worst*100, 2),
                sa_Sharpe=round(sa["Sharpe"], 2), dSharpe=round(s_combo - s_inc, 3),
                dCalmar=round(cal_combo - cal_inc, 2),
                orthogonal=ortho, survives=survives, helps=helps, verdict=verdict)


def main():
    df = pd.read_csv(PANEL, parse_dates=["time"])
    df = df[df[FWD].notna()].copy()
    lo, hi = df[FWD].quantile([0.005, 0.995]); df[FWD] = df[FWD].clip(lo, hi)
    df["ym"] = df["time"].dt.to_period("M")

    streams = {name: ls_stream(df, col, dz) for name, (col, dz) in STYLES.items()}

    # DT5G market-timing monthly stream: w_state(t) * index_ret(t->t+1)
    st = pd.read_csv(STATEF, parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
    st["ym"] = st["time"].dt.to_period("M")
    m = st.groupby("ym").agg(state=("state", lambda s: int(s.mode().iloc[0])),
                             px=("vnindex", "last"))
    m["w"] = m["state"].map(STATE_W)
    m["idx_ret"] = m["px"].pct_change().shift(-1)      # this month-end -> next month-end
    streams["DT5G_TIMING"] = (m["w"] * m["idx_ret"]).dropna()

    # align all to common monthly index
    S = pd.DataFrame(streams).dropna(how="all")
    print(f"Monthly style streams: {S.shape[1]} strategies x {len(S)} months "
          f"({S.index.min()} -> {S.index.max()})\n")

    print("=== STANDALONE (annualized, monthly LS) ===")
    perf = pd.DataFrame({n: ann(streams[n].dropna()) for n in streams}).T
    perf["CAGR"] = (perf["CAGR"]*100).round(1); perf["Vol"] = (perf["Vol"]*100).round(1)
    perf["MaxDD"] = (perf["MaxDD"]*100).round(1)
    print(perf[["CAGR", "Vol", "Sharpe", "MaxDD", "Calmar"]].round(2).to_string())

    print("\n=== BIODIVERSITY CORRELATION MATRIX (monthly returns) ===")
    print(S.corr().round(2).to_string())

    # incumbent book = MOMENTUM (V4/V5 core). Ecosystem = {MOMENTUM} for incumbent corr;
    # blend = the broader existing book it sits in.
    incumbent = "MOMENTUM"
    eco = {k: streams[k].dropna() for k in ["MOMENTUM", "VALUE_PB", "QUALITY_ROE"]}
    candidates = ["VALUE_PB", "VALUE_PE", "QUALITY_ROE", "QUALITY_ROIC", "FSCORE",
                  "RSI", "FLOW_CMF", "POSITION", "PBZ", "DT5G_TIMING"]
    rows = [biodiversity({**eco, c: streams[c].dropna()}, c, streams[c].dropna(), incumbent)
            for c in candidates if c != incumbent]
    bd = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    print(f"\n=== BIODIVERSITY VERDICT — candidates vs incumbent book = {incumbent} (V4/V5 core) ===")
    print("  PASS = orthogonal(|corr|<.3) AND survives incumbent's down-months AND improves Sharpe")
    print(bd[["candidate", "corr_inc", "surv_rate", "cand_in_incWorstQ", "sa_Sharpe",
              "dSharpe", "dCalmar", "verdict"]].to_string(index=False))

    bd.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\biodiversity_verdict.csv", index=False)
    S.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\biodiversity_streams.csv")
    print("\nSaved: data/biodiversity_verdict.csv | data/biodiversity_streams.csv")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

toolUseResult.content:
"""
Biodiversity Test (AMH proposal #5)
===================================
AMH: a portfolio of strategies is robust the way an ecosystem is — through
DIVERSITY. A new strategy earns its place only if it is ORTHOGONAL to the
existing book: it must survive / profit in the environments where the incumbents
DIE. (F-system FAILED this — redundant with DT5G, "cùng cò súng"; ORB intraday
PASSED — orthogonal to the daily book.)

This is a reusable screen. Given an ecosystem of strategy return streams and a
candidate, it scores three things and returns PASS/FAIL:
  1. ORTHOGONALITY   — corr(candidate, incumbent) and corr(candidate, blend)
  2. SURVIVAL        — does the candidate make money in the incumbent's worst
                       months? (% of incumbent-down months where candidate > 0;
                       mean candidate return in incumbent's worst quartile)
  3. MARGINAL UPLIFT — Sharpe/Calmar of incumbent vs incumbent + w*candidate
                       (does adding it actually improve risk-adjusted return?)

Demo ecosystem: monthly long/short quintile style streams (1-month holding, non-
overlapping) built from data/edge_panel.csv — VALUE / MOMENTUM / QUALITY — plus a
DT5G market-timing stream. Incumbent = MOMENTUM (the V4/V5 core). Candidates: the
other styles + flow/position/mean-reversion.

Run: python biodiversity_test.py
"""
import sys
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PANEL = WORKDIR + r"\data\edge_panel.csv"
STATEF = WORKDIR + r"\data\dt5g_vnindex.csv"
FWD = "fwd_1m"          # 1-month holding -> non-overlapping monthly stream
QTILE = 0.20
MIN_NAMES = 25
STATE_W = {1: 0.0, 2: 0.2, 3: 0.7, 4: 1.0, 5: 1.3}

# style -> (column, drop-exact-zero[bank placeholder])
STYLES = {
    "VALUE_PB":   ("PB", False),
    "VALUE_PE":   ("PE", False),
    "MOMENTUM":   ("mom_200", False),
    "RSI":        ("D_RSI", False),
    "QUALITY_ROE":("ROE_Min5Y", True),
    "QUALITY_ROIC":("ROIC5Y", True),
    "FSCORE":     ("FSCORE", False),
    "FLOW_CMF":   ("D_CMF", False),
    "POSITION":   ("C_L1M", False),
    "PBZ":        ("pb_z", False),
}


def ls_stream(df, col, drop_zero):
    """Monthly long/short top-vs-bottom quintile return (1m holding), oriented +profit."""
    out = {}
    for ym, g in df.groupby("ym"):
        s = g[[col, FWD]].dropna()
        if drop_zero:
            s = s[s[col] != 0.0]
        if len(s) < MIN_NAMES or s[col].nunique() < 5:
            continue
        k = max(3, int(len(s) * QTILE))
        ss = s.sort_values(col)
        out[ym] = ss[FWD].iloc[-k:].mean() - ss[FWD].iloc[:k].mean()
    st = pd.Series(out).sort_index()
    # orient so positive = profitable (long the favorable end)
    if st.mean() < 0:
        st = -st
    return st


def ann(stream):
    mu = stream.mean() * 12
    sd = stream.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12)
    sharpe = mu / sd if sd > 0 else 0
    nav = (1 + stream).cumprod()
    dd = (nav / nav.cummax() - 1).min()
    calmar = mu / abs(dd) if dd < 0 else np.nan
    return dict(CAGR=mu, Vol=sd, Sharpe=sharpe, MaxDD=dd, Calmar=calmar)


def biodiversity(ecosystem, cand_name, cand, incumbent_name):
    """Score a candidate's biodiversity contribution. Returns a verdict dict."""
    inc = ecosystem[incumbent_name]
    blend = pd.DataFrame(ecosystem).mean(axis=1)   # equal-weight existing book
    idx = cand.index.intersection(inc.index)
    c, i, b = cand.loc[idx], inc.loc[idx], blend.loc[idx]
    corr_inc = c.corr(i)
    corr_blend = c.corr(b)
    # survival in incumbent's pain
    down = i < 0
    surv_rate = (c[down] > 0).mean() if down.sum() else np.nan
    worstq = i <= i.quantile(0.25)
    cand_in_worst = c[worstq].mean()
    inc_in_worst = i[worstq].mean()
    # marginal uplift: incumbent vs incumbent + 0.3*candidate (both rescaled later by user)
    w = 0.3
    combo = i + w * c
    s_inc = ann(i)["Sharpe"]; s_combo = ann(combo)["Sharpe"]
    cal_inc = ann(i)["Calmar"]; cal_combo = ann(combo)["Calmar"]
    sa = ann(c)   # standalone
    ortho = abs(corr_inc) < 0.30
    survives = (surv_rate is not np.nan) and surv_rate >= 0.50 and cand_in_worst > 0
    helps = (s_combo > s_inc) and sa["Sharpe"] > 0
    npass = sum([ortho, survives, helps])
    verdict = "PASS" if npass == 3 else ("PARTIAL" if npass == 2 else "FAIL")
    return dict(candidate=cand_name, corr_inc=round(corr_inc, 2), corr_blend=round(corr_blend, 2),
                surv_rate=round(surv_rate, 2), cand_in_incWorstQ=round(cand_in_worst*100, 2),
                sa_Sharpe=round(sa["Sharpe"], 2), dSharpe=round(s_combo - s_inc, 3),
                dCalmar=round(cal_combo - cal_inc, 2),
                orthogonal=ortho, survives=survives, helps=helps, verdict=verdict)


def main():
    df = pd.read_csv(PANEL, parse_dates=["time"])
    df = df[df[FWD].notna()].copy()
    lo, hi = df[FWD].quantile([0.005, 0.995]); df[FWD] = df[FWD].clip(lo, hi)
    df["ym"] = df["time"].dt.to_period("M")

    streams = {name: ls_stream(df, col, dz) for name, (col, dz) in STYLES.items()}

    # DT5G market-timing monthly stream: w_state(t) * index_ret(t->t+1)
    st = pd.read_csv(STATEF, parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
    st["ym"] = st["time"].dt.to_period("M")
    m = st.groupby("ym").agg(state=("state", lambda s: int(s.mode().iloc[0])),
                             px=("vnindex", "last"))
    m["w"] = m["state"].map(STATE_W)
    m["idx_ret"] = m["px"].pct_change().shift(-1)      # this month-end -> next month-end
    streams["DT5G_TIMING"] = (m["w"] * m["idx_ret"]).dropna()

    # align all to common monthly index
    S = pd.DataFrame(streams).dropna(how="all")
    print(f"Monthly style streams: {S.shape[1]} strategies x {len(S)} months "
          f"({S.index.min()} -> {S.index.max()})\n")

    print("=== STANDALONE (annualized, monthly LS) ===")
    perf = pd.DataFrame({n: ann(streams[n].dropna()) for n in streams}).T
    perf["CAGR"] = (perf["CAGR"]*100).round(1); perf["Vol"] = (perf["Vol"]*100).round(1)
    perf["MaxDD"] = (perf["MaxDD"]*100).round(1)
    print(perf[["CAGR", "Vol", "Sharpe", "MaxDD", "Calmar"]].round(2).to_string())

    print("\n=== BIODIVERSITY CORRELATION MATRIX (monthly returns) ===")
    print(S.corr().round(2).to_string())

    # incumbent book = MOMENTUM (V4/V5 core). Ecosystem = {MOMENTUM} for incumbent corr;
    # blend = the broader existing book it sits in.
    incumbent = "MOMENTUM"
    eco = {k: streams[k].dropna() for k in ["MOMENTUM", "VALUE_PB", "QUALITY_ROE"]}
    candidates = ["VALUE_PB", "VALUE_PE", "QUALITY_ROE", "QUALITY_ROIC", "FSCORE",
                  "RSI", "FLOW_CMF", "POSITION", "PBZ", "DT5G_TIMING"]
    rows = [biodiversity({**eco, c: streams[c].dropna()}, c, streams[c].dropna(), incumbent)
            for c in candidates if c != incumbent]
    bd = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    print(f"\n=== BIODIVERSITY VERDICT — candidates vs incumbent book = {incumbent} (V4/V5 core) ===")
    print("  PASS = orthogonal(|corr|<.3) AND survives incumbent's down-months AND improves Sharpe")
    print(bd[["candidate", "corr_inc", "surv_rate", "cand_in_incWorstQ", "sa_Sharpe",
              "dSharpe", "dCalmar", "verdict"]].to_string(index=False))

    bd.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\biodiversity_verdict.csv", index=False)
    S.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\biodiversity_streams.csv")
    print("\nSaved: data/biodiversity_verdict.csv | data/biodiversity_streams.csv")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Công cụ chạy hoàn hảo và kết quả **đóng trọn vòng với #1–#4**. 

## #5 Biodiversity Test — xong

`biodiversity_test.py` (reusable): cho một hệ sinh thái stream + ứng viên → chấm Orthogonality + Survival (kiếm tiền trong drawdown của book cũ?) + Marginal Sharpe/Calmar → PASS/FAIL. Demo: incumbent = **MOMENTUM (lõi V4/V5)**, test các style khác.

**Verdict (vs book momentum):**

| Ứng viên | corr | sống sót down-months | trong worst-Q của mom | Sharpe đơn | ΔSharpe | Verdict |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **VALUE_PB** | **−0.30** | 70% | **+3.9%** | 1.60 | +0.45 | ✅ **PASS** |
| **VALUE_PE** | −0.04 | 74% | +2.3% | 1.85 | +0.30 | ✅ **PASS** |
| **DT5G_TIMING** | 0.03 | 51% | +0.6% | 0.67 | +0.11 | ✅ PASS (trục khác hẳn) |
| QUALITY_ROIC | −0.06 | 53% | +0.1% | 0.24 | +0.04 | ✅ PASS (bảo hiểm crisis, yếu đơn lẻ) |
| FSCORE / QUALITY_ROE | 0.31 / −0.09 | 56/60% | + / − | — | + | 🟡 PARTIAL |
| **RSI** | **0.63** | 49% | −1.5% | 1.36 | +0.15 | ❌ FAIL (CHÍNH là momentum) |
| **FLOW_CMF** | 0.52 | 39% | **−3.1%** | 0.29 | −0.04 | ❌ FAIL (chảy máu CÙNG mom) |
| POSITION / PBZ | 0.38 / 0.55 | 56/33% | − / −3.1% | — | −/+ | ❌ FAIL |

**Đọc — công cụ tự tái dựng cả chân lý đã biết lẫn bài học F-system:**
1. **VALUE là bạn đa dạng hóa tự nhiên của book momentum** — corr ÂM (−0.30), kiếm tiền đúng lúc momentum đau (+3.9% trong worst-quartile), Sharpe đơn 1.60. Đây chính xác là thứ #1 báo *vẫn sống khi momentum FLIP* → nếu V4/V5 có sleeve value, đã đỡ được cú chảy máu 2025-26.
2. **DT5G timing trực giao tuyệt đối (corr 0.03)** với stock-selection — xác nhận *vì sao* kiến trúc production (cổng DT5G × book) hoạt động: hai trục khác hẳn nhau.
3. **Công cụ FAIL đúng các ứng viên dư thừa** (RSI/FLOW/PBZ/POSITION corr cao với momentum, chảy máu cùng nó) = đúng logic "cùng cò súng" của memo F-system. Nó tái tạo được phán quyết F-system mà không cần stream F-system.

**Kết luận AMH cốt lõi:** book V4/V5 momentum là một **độc canh (monoculture)** đang ở pha inefficiency. Đối tác hoàn thiện biodiversity của nó là **VALUE (PB/PE)** — âm tương quan, lãi trong drawdown của momentum, và *đang khỏe* (#1). Thêm tín hiệu momentum-flavored (RSI/flow/pbz) = zero đa dạng hóa = book vẫn mong manh với cú lật regime momentum (đúng cái vừa xảy ra).

*Caveat:* đây là stream long-short paper (proxy style), book thật là long-only momentum gated DT5G → corr tuyệt đối khác, nhưng hướng (value đa dạng hóa momentum) bền vững. Để chấm một strategy thật, nạp return stream thật của nó.

Đang lưu memory + viết synthesis tổng cả 5.

input.content:
---
name: biodiversity_test_amh5_2026
description: Biodiversity Test (AMH #5) — orthogonality screen for new strategies. VALUE is the natural diversifier of the V4/V5 momentum monoculture (corr −0.30, profits in its drawdowns); reproduces F-system "cùng cò súng" reject logic.
metadata:
  type: project
---

**AMH proposal #5 — Biodiversity Test** (`biodiversity_test.py`, [REDACTED]09). Reusable screen: given an ecosystem of strategy return streams + a candidate, scores (1) ORTHOGONALITY corr to incumbent/blend, (2) SURVIVAL = % of incumbent's down-months where candidate>0 + mean candidate return in incumbent's worst quartile, (3) MARGINAL Sharpe/Calmar uplift from adding it. PASS = orthogonal(|corr|<.3) AND survives incumbent's pain AND improves Sharpe. Demo ecosystem = monthly long/short quintile style streams (1m holding, non-overlapping) from `data/edge_panel.csv` + DT5G-timing stream; incumbent = MOMENTUM (V4/V5 core). Outputs `data/biodiversity_verdict.csv`, `data/biodiversity_streams.csv`.

**Verdict vs MOMENTUM incumbent:**
- **VALUE_PB PASS** (corr −0.30, survives 70% of mom down-months, +3.9% in mom's worst quartile, standalone Sharpe 1.60, dSharpe +0.45) and **VALUE_PE PASS** (corr −0.04, Sharpe 1.85) — VALUE is THE natural diversifier of a momentum book. Exactly what #1 flagged alive while momentum FLIPPED → a value sleeve would have cushioned the 2025-26 V4/V5 bleed.
- **DT5G_TIMING PASS, corr 0.03** — market-timing is a perfectly orthogonal AXIS to stock-selection; validates why production architecture (DT5G gate × stock book) works.
- **QUALITY_ROIC PASS (marginal)** — orthogonal crisis-insurance, weak standalone (Sharpe 0.24, only pays in CRISIS per #3).
- **RSI / FLOW_CMF / POSITION / PBZ FAIL** — corr 0.38–0.63 with momentum, bleed WITH it (FLOW −3.1% / PBZ −3.06% in mom's worst quartile). Reproduces the F-system "cùng cò súng" species-redundancy reject ([[f_system_protect_v4v5_2026]]) WITHOUT needing the F-system stream.

**Core AMH conclusion (capstone of the 5-part series): the V4/V5 momentum book is a MONOCULTURE currently in its inefficiency phase (#1 momentum FLIP). Its biodiversity-completing partner is VALUE (PB/PE) — negatively correlated, profits in momentum's drawdowns, currently healthy. Adding momentum-flavored signals = zero diversification = book stays fragile to momentum-regime flips.** Caveat: cross-sectional long-short paper streams (style proxies), not the real long-only DT5G-gated book — absolute corr differs but the direction (value diversifies momentum) is robust + matches literature. To screen a real strategy, feed its actual return stream into `biodiversity()`.

**AMH SERIES COMPLETE (#1-#5, all [REDACTED]09):** #1 Edge Health Monitor (rolling IC; momentum FLIPPED, value alive) → #2 Vol-target (REJECTED — redundant with DT5G) → #3 Fitness Matrix (value all-weather, quality=CRISIS-only, momentum=good-times) → #4 Ecology Dashboard (mood PROCYCLICAL not contrarian; = fragility gauge; NOW narrow-breadth divergence) → #5 Biodiversity (value = the missing diversifier). **Convergent thread: the production momentum book is a fragile monoculture in a momentum-inefficiency regime; the unanimous fix across all 5 lenses = add a VALUE sleeve.** Files: edge_health_monitor.py, voltarget_overlay.py, fitness_matrix.py, ecology_dashboard.py, biodiversity_test.py.

Đã lưu memory #5. **Loạt AMH 5 phần hoàn tất.** Đây là capstone — và điều đáng giá nhất là 5 lăng kính độc lập **hội tụ về cùng một kết luận**.

## Tổng hợp AMH #1–#5 — chuỗi hội tụ

| # | Công cụ | Phát hiện cốt lõi |
|---|---|---|
| **1** | Edge Health Monitor | Momentum (mom_200/RSI) **FLIPPED** 12T qua; **value vẫn khỏe**; quality phân hóa (per-sector: value đảo dấu BANK↔CONSUMER) |
| **2** | Vol-target layer | **Bác bỏ** — dư thừa với DT5G (cùng tín hiệu vol); chỉ là van risk-of-ruin cho futures |
| **3** | Fitness Matrix | Value **all-weather** (BULL +14%); quality **chỉ CRISIS**; momentum **good-times, đảo ở CRISIS** |
| **4** | Ecology Dashboard | Mood **procyclical** (không fade được); = thước **mong manh**; NOW = phân kỳ breadth hẹp cuối chu kỳ |
| **5** | Biodiversity Test | **VALUE = đối tác đa dạng hóa** của book momentum (corr −0.30, lãi trong drawdown của nó); DT5G trực giao; momentum-flavored signals dư thừa |

**Sợi chỉ xuyên suốt — 5 góc nhìn khác nhau, một kết luận:**

> Book sản xuất V4/V5 là một **độc canh momentum** đang ở đúng **pha inefficiency của chu kỳ AMH**. Mỗi lăng kính chỉ ra cùng một thuốc giải: **bổ sung một sleeve VALUE (PB/PE)** — nó âm tương quan (#5), lãi đúng lúc momentum đau (#5), all-weather và mạnh nhất ở 2 cực (#3), đang khỏe khi momentum chết (#1), và đỡ được sự mong manh hiện tại (#4).

Đây không phải năm khuyến nghị rời — là **một** khuyến nghị được năm phương pháp độc lập xác nhận chéo. Đó chính là điều Andrew Lo muốn: không tối ưu một chiến lược, mà **duy trì hệ sinh thái đa dạng và để môi trường quyết định lăng kính nào dẫn dắt**.

**Hai bước kế tiếp khả dĩ (khi anh muốn):**
1. **Hành động trên kết luận** — prototype một **value sleeve** ghép vào V4/V5 (gated DT5G), backtest xem nó có thật sự cải thiện Sharpe/Calmar/giảm cú chảy máu 2025-26 không. Đây là nơi nghiên cứu AMH biến thành tiền.
2. **Productionize bộ giám sát** — nối `ecology_now.md` + `edge_health_block.md` vào report 18:00, và refresh #3/#5 theo tháng, để anh có một "AMH cockpit" sống.

content.text: Found the **real prod-spec daily NAV** (V1–V5, 2014→2026-05). I'll graft a transparent DT5G-gated value sleeve onto the actual V4/V5 streams and test the blend. Building it:

input.content:
"""
Value Sleeve Test (acting on the AMH #1-#5 conclusion)
======================================================
All five AMH lenses converged: the V4/V5 book is a MOMENTUM monoculture in a
momentum-inefficiency regime; the unanimous fix = add a VALUE sleeve (negatively
correlated, profits in momentum's drawdowns, currently healthy). This tests it:
reallocate weight w from the real prod-spec V4/V5 NAV into a transparent,
DT5G-gated long-only VALUE book, and measure Sharpe / Calmar / the 2025-26 bleed.

Incumbent  : REAL prod-spec daily NAV (data/5sys_prodspec_...dt5g.csv) -> V4, V5.
Value sleeve: monthly long-only top-quintile cheapest (PB+PE rank), DT5G-gated to
             the same state weights, TC on turnover. Built from data/edge_panel.csv.
Combine at return level (monthly): blend = (1-w)*book + w*value, w in a grid.

NOTE: the value sleeve is a TRANSPARENT PROXY (equal-weight quintile, no capacity
model), so treat absolute numbers as indicative; the DECISION signal is the
Sharpe/Calmar DELTA and the grind-window cushion.

Run: python value_sleeve_test.py
"""
import sys
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
NAVF = WORKDIR + r"\data\5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g.csv"
PANEL = WORKDIR + r"\data\edge_panel.csv"
STATEF = WORKDIR + r"\data\dt5g_vnindex.csv"
FWD = "fwd_1m"
QTILE = 0.20
MIN_NAMES = 25
TC = 0.001
STATE_W = {1: 0.0, 2: 0.2, 3: 0.7, 4: 1.0, 5: 1.3}
GRIND = ("2025-09", "2026-03")


def ann(ret):
    ret = ret.dropna()
    mu = ret.mean() * 12
    sd = ret.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12)
    sharpe = mu / sd if sd > 0 else 0
    dn = ret[ret < 0].std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12)
    sortino = mu / dn if dn > 0 else 0
    nav = (1 + ret).cumprod()
    dd = (nav / nav.cummax() - 1).min()
    calmar = mu / abs(dd) if dd < 0 else np.nan
    return dict(CAGR=mu*100, Sharpe=sharpe, Sortino=sortino, MaxDD=dd*100, Calmar=calmar)


def build_value_sleeve():
    df = pd.read_csv(PANEL, parse_dates=["time"])
    df = df[df[FWD].notna()].copy()
    lo, hi = df[FWD].quantile([0.005, 0.995]); df[FWD] = df[FWD].clip(lo, hi)
    df["ym"] = df["time"].dt.to_period("M")
    st = pd.read_csv(STATEF, parse_dates=["time"]); st["ym"] = st["time"].dt.to_period("M")
    modal = st.groupby("ym")["state"].agg(lambda s: int(s.mode().iloc[0]))

    rets, prev = {}, set()
    for ym, g in df.groupby("ym"):
        s = g[["ticker", "PB", "PE", FWD]].dropna()
        if len(s) < MIN_NAMES:
            continue
        s["vscore"] = s["PB"].rank(pct=True) + s["PE"].rank(pct=True)   # low = cheap
        k = max(5, int(len(s) * QTILE))
        picks = s.nsmallest(k, "vscore")
        raw = picks[FWD].mean()
        names = set(picks["ticker"])
        turn = 1.0 if not prev else 1 - len(names & prev) / len(names)
        prev = names
        w = STATE_W.get(int(modal.get(ym, 3)), 0.7)
        rets[ym] = w * raw - TC * turn * w
    return pd.Series(rets).sort_index()


def book_monthly(nav_col):
    nav = pd.read_csv(NAVF, parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")[nav_col]
    m = nav.resample("ME").last()
    r = m.pct_change()
    r.index = r.index.to_period("M")
    return r.dropna()


def sub(ret, lo, hi):
    return ret[(ret.index >= pd.Period(lo)) & (ret.index <= pd.Period(hi))]


def report(name, book, value, vni):
    idx = book.index.intersection(value.index)
    book, value = book.loc[idx], value.loc[idx]
    vni = vni.reindex(idx)
    print(f"\n################  INCUMBENT = {name}  ################")
    print(f"value-sleeve standalone: {fmt(ann(value))}")
    print(f"corr(book, value) = {book.corr(value):+.2f}   "
          f"(months {idx.min()} -> {idx.max()}, n={len(idx)})")
    rows = []
    for w in [0.0, 0.2, 0.3, 0.4, 0.5]:
        blend = (1 - w) * book + w * value
        full = ann(blend)
        oos = ann(sub(blend, "2020-01", "2026-12"))
        grind = sub(blend, *GRIND)
        grind_cum = ((1 + grind).prod() - 1) * 100
        rows.append(dict(w_value=w, **{k: round(v, 2) for k, v in full.items()},
                         Sharpe_OOS=round(oos["Sharpe"], 2),
                         grind_2025_26_pct=round(grind_cum, 1)))
    res = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    print(res.to_string(index=False))
    # benchmark grind
    g_book = ((1 + sub(book, *GRIND)).prod() - 1) * 100
    g_val = ((1 + sub(value, *GRIND)).prod() - 1) * 100
    g_vni = ((1 + sub(vni, *GRIND)).prod() - 1) * 100
    print(f"  GRIND {GRIND[0]}..{GRIND[1]}: book {g_book:+.1f}% | value {g_val:+.1f}% | VNI {g_vni:+.1f}%")
    return res


def fmt(m):
    return (f"CAGR {m['CAGR']:.1f}% Sharpe {m['Sharpe']:.2f} Sortino {m['Sortino']:.2f} "
            f"MaxDD {m['MaxDD']:.1f}% Calmar {m['Calmar']:.2f}")


def main():
    value = build_value_sleeve()
    vni = book_monthly("VNI")
    print(f"Value sleeve: {len(value)} months {value.index.min()} -> {value.index.max()}")
    allres = {}
    for col, label in [("V4_V121_ENS_TQ34b", "V4 (V121_ENS, recommended)"),
                       ("V5_V4_KellyQ2", "V5 (Kelly)")]:
        book = book_monthly(col)
        allres[label] = report(label, book, value, vni)
    # save
    out = pd.concat({k: v.set_index("w_value") for k, v in allres.items()}, axis=0)
    out.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\value_sleeve_results.csv")
    print("\nSaved: data/value_sleeve_results.csv")
    print("\nDECISION READ: compare w=0 (book alone) vs w=0.2-0.4 on Sharpe/Calmar/grind cushion.")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
**Kết quả mạnh và sạch** — value sleeve cải thiện *mọi* metric đơn điệu. Đây là lúc nghiên cứu AMH biến thành tiền.

## Value Sleeve grafted lên V4/V5 thật (prod-spec NAV)

| | book đơn (w=0) | +20% value | +30% | +50% |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **V4** CAGR | 21.5% | 22.4% | 22.9% | 23.8% |
| Sharpe | 1.23 | 1.34 | 1.38 | 1.43 |
| **Calmar** | 0.93 | 1.04 | 1.09 | 1.22 |
| MaxDD | −23.1% | −21.6% | −20.9% | −19.5% |
| Sharpe OOS (2020+) | 1.11 | 1.21 | 1.24 | 1.27 |
| **Grind 2025-26** | **−23.1%** | −21.6% | −20.9% | −19.5% |
| **V5** Sharpe | 1.26 | 1.36 | 1.40 | 1.44 |
| V5 Calmar | 1.16 | 1.25 | 1.29 | 1.38 |

**Bằng chứng đắt nhất — cushion đúng cửa sổ momentum chết:** trong grind 9/2025→3/2026, book bled **−23% (V4) / −20% (V5)**, còn value sleeve chỉ **−16.2%** (VNI phẳng −0.5%). Tức value chảy máu *ít hơn* đúng giai đoạn momentum ở pha inefficiency (#1) → thêm 30% value đã đỡ ~2pp. **OOS Sharpe cũng cải thiện** (1.11→1.27) → không phải hiệu ứng early-years.

**Ba điều thành thật (quan trọng để không over-claim):**
1. **corr(book, value) = +0.64, KHÔNG âm** — khác #5 (−0.30). Vì đây là 2 book **long-only cùng gated DT5G** → chia sẻ beta thị trường + cùng về tiền mặt khi CRISIS. Lợi ích đa dạng hóa ở đây **không** đến từ tương quan âm, mà từ value có **Sharpe đơn cao hơn (1.35) + skew tốt hơn (Sortino 2.99 vs ~2.8)** + bled ít hơn trong grind. (Tương quan âm là tính chất long-SHORT; long-only thì mất.)
2. **Value sleeve là PROXY thổi phồng** (equal-weight quintile, không model capacity/slippage) — memory cảnh báo proxy inflate 3–12pp. Nên *con số tuyệt đối lạc quan*; tín hiệu quyết định là **DELTA + grind cushion** (đều bền với inflation vì là tương đối).
3. **"Đơn điệu tới 50%" là tham lam in-sample.** Không nên all-in. **~25–30% là phần hợp lý** — gặt phần lớn lợi Calmar (V4: 0.93→1.04–1.09) mà không cược book vào Sharpe ảo của proxy.

**Khuyến nghị:** thêm **sleeve value ~25–30%** vào V4/V5 (gated DT5G), dùng PE/PB (PE bền nhất theo #1). Nó cải thiện Sharpe/Calmar full+OOS và đỡ đúng cú chảy máu momentum — xác nhận thẳng luận điểm AMH. **Trước khi deploy:** (a) thay proxy bằng **value book thật có model capacity/TC/slippage**, (b) walk-forward trọng số, (c) test biến thể **value KHÔNG gated** (vì #3 cho thấy value lãi *trong* CRISIS — gate về tiền mặt có thể cắt mất khoảnh khắc tốt nhất của value).

Đang lưu kết quả vào memory #5.

---
name: biodiversity_test_amh5_2026
description: Biodiversity Test (AMH
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: c20741c2-d11c-4052-813a-f3c503120558
---

**AMH proposal #5 — Biodiversity Test** (`biodiversity_test.py`, [REDACTED]09). Reusable screen: given an ecosystem of strategy return streams + a candidate, scores (1) ORTHOGONALITY corr to incumbent/blend, (2) SURVIVAL = % of incumbent's down-months where candidate>0 + mean candidate return in incumbent's worst quartile, (3) MARGINAL Sharpe/Calmar uplift from adding it. PASS = orthogonal(|corr|<.3) AND survives incumbent's pain AND improves Sharpe. Demo ecosystem = monthly long/short quintile style streams (1m holding, non-overlapping) from `data/edge_panel.csv` + DT5G-timing stream; incumbent = MOMENTUM (V4/V5 core). Outputs `data/biodiversity_verdict.csv`, `data/biodiversity_streams.csv`.

**Verdict vs MOMENTUM incumbent:**
- **VALUE_PB PASS** (corr −0.30, survives 70% of mom down-months, +3.9% in mom's worst quartile, standalone Sharpe 1.60, dSharpe +0.45) and **VALUE_PE PASS** (corr −0.04, Sharpe 1.85) — VALUE is THE natural diversifier of a momentum book. Exactly what #1 flagged alive while momentum FLIPPED → a value sleeve would have cushioned the 2025-26 V4/V5 bleed.
- **DT5G_TIMING PASS, corr 0.03** — market-timing is a perfectly orthogonal AXIS to stock-selection; validates why production architecture (DT5G gate × stock book) works.
- **QUALITY_ROIC PASS (marginal)** — orthogonal crisis-insurance, weak standalone (Sharpe 0.24, only pays in CRISIS per #3).
- **RSI / FLOW_CMF / POSITION / PBZ FAIL** — corr 0.38–0.63 with momentum, bleed WITH it (FLOW −3.1% / PBZ −3.06% in mom's worst quartile). Reproduces the F-system "cùng cò súng" species-redundancy reject ([[f_system_protect_v4v5_2026]]) WITHOUT needing the F-system stream.

**Core AMH conclusion (capstone of the 5-part series): the V4/V5 momentum book is a MONOCULTURE currently in its inefficiency phase (#1 momentum FLIP). Its biodiversity-completing partner is VALUE (PB/PE) — negatively correlated, profits in momentum's drawdowns, currently healthy. Adding momentum-flavored signals = zero diversification = book stays fragile to momentum-regime flips.** Caveat: cross-sectional long-short paper streams (style proxies), not the real long-only DT5G-gated book — absolute corr differs but the direction (value diversifies momentum) is robust + matches literature. To screen a real strategy, feed its actual return stream into `biodiversity()`.

Kết luận hội tụ của cả 5 lăng kính — *book momentum độc canh đang inefficiency → thêm value* — giờ có bằng chứng định lượng: sleeve value 25–30% nâng Sharpe/Calmar (full + OOS) và đỡ đúng cú grind 2025-26.

**Ba việc trước khi deploy thật** (chọn cái nào tiếp khi anh muốn):

2. **Test value UNGATED** — vì #3 cho thấy value lãi *trong* CRISIS; có thể cổng DT5G đang cắt mất khoảnh khắc tốt nhất của value. Nếu ungated tốt hơn → kiến trúc đẹp: momentum gated phòng thủ + value không gated tấn công khi rẻ.
3. **Walk-forward trọng số** — xác nhận ~25–30% không phải artifact in-sample.

Tôi nghĩ **#2 (ungated value)** đáng làm trước — nó rẻ, và có thể đổi cả cách thiết kế kiến trúc (chứ không chỉ chỉnh tham số). Nói khi anh muốn tiếp.

Điểm tinh tế cần làm đúng: #3 nói *spread* value (cổ rẻ thắng cổ đắt) mạnh trong CRISIS = đó là quyết định **chọn cổ**, khác với quyết định **có nên ở trong thị trường** (cổng DT5G). Hai cái trực giao (đúng #5). Ungating = ở lại thị trường trong crisis để gặt outperformance tương đối của value, NHƯNG ăn cú sập tuyệt đối. Để dữ liệu quyết định:

input.content:
"""
Value Sleeve — GATED vs UNGATED (AMH action, follow-up #2)
=========================================================
#3 showed value's cross-sectional edge (cheap beats expensive) is STRONG in
CRISIS. But that is a SELECTION fact (tilt to cheap IF invested), orthogonal to
the TIMING decision (whether to be invested = the DT5G gate, #5). Question: when
we run a value sleeve, should it follow the DT5G gate to cash in CRISIS (GATED),
or stay invested to capture value's relative outperformance (UNGATED)?
Let the data decide. Variants of the long-only top-quintile-cheap value book:
  GATED     = w_state * raw   (cash in CRISIS, like the momentum book)
  UNGATED   = 1.00   * raw    ([REDACTED] fully invested)
  FLOOR50   = max(w_state,0.5)* raw  (half-invested floor through stress)
Compare standalone + CRISIS/BEAR-conditional + blended onto real V4/V5.

Run: python value_sleeve_gating_test.py
"""
import sys
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
NAVF = WORKDIR + r"\data\5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g.csv"
PANEL = WORKDIR + r"\data\edge_panel.csv"
STATEF = WORKDIR + r"\data\dt5g_vnindex.csv"
FWD = "fwd_1m"
QTILE = 0.20
MIN_NAMES = 25
TC = 0.001
STATE_W = {1: 0.0, 2: 0.2, 3: 0.7, 4: 1.0, 5: 1.3}


def ann(ret):
    ret = ret.dropna()
    mu = ret.mean() * 12
    sd = ret.std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12)
    sharpe = mu / sd if sd > 0 else 0
    dn = ret[ret < 0].std(ddof=1) * np.sqrt(12)
    sortino = mu / dn if dn > 0 else 0
    nav = (1 + ret).cumprod()
    dd = (nav / nav.cummax() - 1).min()
    calmar = mu / abs(dd) if dd < 0 else np.nan
    return dict(CAGR=mu*100, Sharpe=sharpe, Sortino=sortino, MaxDD=dd*100, Calmar=calmar)


def fmt(m):
    return (f"CAGR {m['CAGR']:5.1f}%  Sharpe {m['Sharpe']:.2f}  Sortino {m['Sortino']:.2f}  "
            f"MaxDD {m['MaxDD']:6.1f}%  Calmar {m['Calmar']:.2f}")


def build():
    df = pd.read_csv(PANEL, parse_dates=["time"])
    df = df[df[FWD].notna()].copy()
    lo, hi = df[FWD].quantile([0.005, 0.995]); df[FWD] = df[FWD].clip(lo, hi)
    df["ym"] = df["time"].dt.to_period("M")
    st = pd.read_csv(STATEF, parse_dates=["time"]); st["ym"] = st["time"].dt.to_period("M")
    modal = st.groupby("ym")["state"].agg(lambda s: int(s.mode().iloc[0]))

    raw, wst, state, prev = {}, {}, {}, set()
    for ym, g in df.groupby("ym"):
        s = g[["ticker", "PB", "PE", FWD]].dropna()
        if len(s) < MIN_NAMES:
            continue
        s["vscore"] = s["PB"].rank(pct=True) + s["PE"].rank(pct=True)
        k = max(5, int(len(s) * QTILE))
        picks = s.nsmallest(k, "vscore")
        names = set(picks["ticker"])
        turn = 1.0 if not prev else 1 - len(names & prev) / len(names)
        prev = names
        stt = int(modal.get(ym, 3))
        raw[ym] = picks[FWD].mean() - TC * turn   # raw value return net of TC (pre-gate)
        wst[ym] = STATE_W.get(stt, 0.7)
        state[ym] = stt
    raw = pd.Series(raw).sort_index(); wst = pd.Series(wst).reindex(raw.index)
    state = pd.Series(state).reindex(raw.index)
    variants = {
        "GATED":   wst * raw,
        "UNGATED": 1.00 * raw,
        "FLOOR50": np.maximum(wst, 0.5) * raw,
    }
    return pd.DataFrame(variants), raw, state


def book_monthly(col):
    nav = pd.read_csv(NAVF, parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")[col]
    r = nav.resample("ME").last().pct_change()
    r.index = r.index.to_period("M")
    return r.dropna()


def main():
    V, raw, state = build()
    print(f"Value sleeve variants: {len(V)} months {V.index.min()} -> {V.index.max()}")
    print(f"Months by state: " + ", ".join(f"{k}:{(state==k).sum()}" for k in sorted(state.unique())))

    print("\n=== STANDALONE (full history) ===")
    for c in V.columns:
        print(f"  {c:8s} {fmt(ann(V[c]))}")

    print("\n=== CRISIS+BEAR conditional (states 1-2) — what gating saves/costs ===")
    cb = state.isin([1, 2])
    print(f"  months in CRISIS+BEAR: {cb.sum()}")
    for c in V.columns:
        seg = V[c][cb]
        print(f"  {c:8s} mean {seg.mean()*100:+.2f}%/mo  cum {((1+seg).prod()-1)*100:+.1f}%  "
              f"worst {seg.min()*100:+.1f}%")
    print(f"  (raw ungated value in crisis+bear: cum {((1+raw[cb]).prod()-1)*100:+.1f}% "
          f"-> staying invested eats the crash; gating to cash = 0)")

    print("\n=== BLEND onto real books at w=0.30 (gated vs ungated vs floor sleeve) ===")
    for col, lbl in [("V4_V121_ENS_TQ34b", "V4"), ("V5_V4_KellyQ2", "V5")]:
        book = book_monthly(col)
        idx = book.index.intersection(V.index)
        print(f"\n  -- {lbl} (book alone): {fmt(ann(book.loc[idx]))}")
        for c in V.columns:
            blend = 0.7 * book.loc[idx] + 0.3 * V[c].loc[idx]
            print(f"     +30% {c:8s}: {fmt(ann(blend))}")

    V.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\value_sleeve_gating.csv")
    print("\nSaved: data/value_sleeve_gating.csv")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

        stt = int(modal.get(ym, 3))
        raw[ym] = picks[FWD].mean() - TC * turn   # raw value return net of TC (pre-gate)
        wst[ym] = STATE_W.get(stt, 0.7)
        state[ym] = stt
    raw = pd.Series(raw).sort_index(); wst = pd.Series(wst).reindex(raw.index)
    state = pd.Series(state).reindex(raw.index)
    variants = {
        "GATED":   wst * raw,
        "UNGATED": 1.00 * raw,
        "FLOOR50": np.maximum(wst, 0.5) * raw,
    }
    return pd.DataFrame(variants), raw, state


def book_monthly(col):
    nav = pd.read_csv(NAVF, parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")[col]
    r = nav.resample("ME").last().pct_change()
    r.index = r.index.to_period("M")
    return r.dropna()


def main():
    V, raw, state = build()
    print(f"Value sleeve variants: {len(V)} months {V.index.min()} -> {V.index.max()}")
    print(f"Months by state: " + ", ".join(f"{k}:{(state==k).sum()}" for k in sorted(state.unique())))

    print("\n=== STANDALONE (full history) ===")
    for c in V.columns:
        print(f"  {c:8s} {fmt(ann(V[c]))}")

    print("\n=== CRISIS+BEAR conditional (states 1-2) — what gating saves/costs ===")
    cb = state.isin([1, 2])
    print(f"  months in CRISIS+BEAR: {cb.sum()}")
    for c in V.columns:
        seg = V[c][cb]
        print(f"  {c:8s} mean {seg.mean()*100:+.2f}%/mo  cum {((1+seg).prod()-1)*100:+.1f}%  "
              f"worst {seg.min()*100:+.1f}%")
    print(f"  (raw ungated value in crisis+bear: cum {((1+raw[cb]).prod()-1)*100:+.1f}% "
          f"-> staying invested eats the crash; gating to cash = 0)")

    print("\n=== BLEND onto real books at w=0.30 (gated vs ungated vs floor sleeve) ===")
    for col, lbl in [("V4_V121_ENS_TQ34b", "V4"), ("V5_V4_KellyQ2", "V5")]:
        book = book_monthly(col)
        idx = book.index.intersection(V.index)
        print(f"\n  -- {lbl} (book alone): {fmt(ann(book.loc[idx]))}")
        for c in V.columns:
            blend = 0.7 * book.loc[idx] + 0.3 * V[c].loc[idx]
            print(f"     +30% {c:8s}: {fmt(ann(blend))}")

    V.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\value_sleeve_gating.csv")
    print("\nSaved: data/value_sleeve_gating.csv")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Câu trả lời rõ và **bác bỏ giả thuyết của tôi** (rằng ungating sẽ tốt hơn vì value lãi trong crisis).

## Value sleeve: GATED vs UNGATED

**Standalone (sleeve riêng):**

| | CAGR | Sharpe | Sortino | MaxDD | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **GATED** | 26.8% | **1.38** | **3.08** | **−16.2%** | **1.65** |
| UNGATED | **32.8%** | 1.18 | 1.95 | **−48.8%** | 0.67 |
| FLOOR50 | 26.5% | 1.26 | 2.73 | −27.3% | 0.97 |

**Conditional CRISIS+BEAR (36 tháng) — cổng cứu/tốn gì:** gated cum −6.7%, floor50 −13.2%, **ungated −31.2%** (ăn trọn cú sập). Value *ungated* lãi nhiều hơn ở thời bình nhưng cú crash 2020/2022 kéo DD lên −49%.

**Bài học khái niệm (quan trọng):** "value lãi trong CRISIS" (#3) là hiệu ứng **chọn cổ tương đối** (cổ rẻ thắng cổ đắt *nếu* đang đầu tư) — **KHÔNG** phải lý do ở lại thị trường qua cú sập. Quyết định *có ở trong thị trường* vẫn thuộc cổng DT5G (timing). Đúng nguyên tắc trực giao #5: **DT5G cho TIMING (kể cả với value), value cho SELECTION.** Cổng de-risk đổi ~6pp CAGR lấy việc cắt MaxDD từ −49% → −16% (Calmar 0.67→1.65) — nó *đang làm việc thật*, không cắt nhầm khoảnh khắc tốt của value.

**Ở mức BLEND 30% (V4/V5), khác biệt loãng đi** (vì book đã tự gated + sleeve chỉ 30% + 111/147 tháng là NEUTRAL/BULL nơi gated≡ungated):

| V4 +30% | CAGR | Sharpe | MaxDD | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| GATED | 22.9% | **1.38** | **−20.9%** | 1.09 |
| UNGATED | 24.6% | 1.34 | −21.2% | **1.16** |
| FLOOR50 | 22.8% | 1.34 | −20.9% | 1.09 |

Ungated blend nhỉnh CAGR/Calmar (do +return), gated nhỉnh Sharpe/DD — chênh nhỏ, và lợi của ungated phần lớn do hồi phục 2020 in-sample.

**Quyết định: giữ value sleeve GATED DT5G.** Nó thống trị risk-adjusted ở mức sleeve (Calmar 1.65 vs 0.67) và Sharpe cao nhất ở blend. Kiến trúc "momentum gated + value ungated tấn công" mà tôi nghĩ tới = **bị bác** (ungated DD −49% không chấp nhận được, lợi blend chỉ ảo do in-sample). FLOOR50 là trung gian nhẹ (Sortino blend tốt nhất 3.47) nếu muốn tham gia crisis-value một chút, nhưng plain GATED gọn và tốt nhất.

Đang cập nhật memory.

input.old_string: **RECOMMENDATION: ~25-30% value sleeve (PE-primary per #1), gated DT5G. Before deploy: real capacity-modeled value book, walk-forward the weight, test UNGATED value variant (#3: value profits IN crisis, gating to cash may cut its best moments).** Results `data/value_sleeve_results.csv`.
input.new_string:
**RECOMMENDATION: ~25-30% value sleeve (PE-primary per #1), GATED DT5G.** Results `data/value_sleeve_results.csv`.

**FOLLOW-UP #2 — GATED vs UNGATED value sleeve (`value_sleeve_gating_test.py`, [REDACTED]09): KEEP IT GATED (hypothesis that ungating helps = REFUTED).** Standalone: GATED Sharpe 1.38/Sortino 3.08/MaxDD −16.2%/Calmar 1.65 DOMINATES UNGATED (CAGR 32.8% but MaxDD −48.8%/Calmar 0.67) and FLOOR50 (Calmar 0.97). CRISIS+BEAR conditional (36mo): ungated value cum −31.2% (eats the crash) vs gated −6.7% (cash). **Conceptual correction: "value works in CRISIS" (#3) is a relative SELECTION effect (cheap beats expensive IF invested), NOT a reason to stay invested through crashes — the TIMING decision stays with DT5G (orthogonality, #5): DT5G for timing even of value, value for selection.** The de-risk gate trades ~6pp CAGR to cut MaxDD −49%→−16% — it earns its keep on value too. At 30% BLEND the variants wash out (book's own gate + dilution + 111/147 months are NEUTRAL/BULL where gated≡ungated): V4 GATED Sharpe 1.38/MaxDD −20.9 vs UNGATED 1.34/−21.2/Calmar 1.16 (ungated edge is in-sample 2020-recovery). The "momentum-gated + value-ungated attack" architecture = rejected. FLOOR50 = mild middle (best blend Sortino 3.47) if wanting some crisis-value participation. Results `data/value_sleeve_gating.csv`.

---
name: biodiversity_test_amh5_2026
description: Biodiversity Test (AMH
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: c20741c2-d11c-4052-813a-f3c503120558
---

**AMH proposal #5 — Biodiversity Test** (`biodiversity_test.py`, [REDACTED]09). Reusable screen: given an ecosystem of strategy return streams + a candidate, scores (1) ORTHOGONALITY corr to incumbent/blend, (2) SURVIVAL = % of incumbent's down-months where candidate>0 + mean candidate return in incumbent's worst quartile, (3) MARGINAL Sharpe/Calmar uplift from adding it. PASS = orthogonal(|corr|<.3) AND survives incumbent's pain AND improves Sharpe. Demo ecosystem = monthly long/short quintile style streams (1m holding, non-overlapping) from `data/edge_panel.csv` + DT5G-timing stream; incumbent = MOMENTUM (V4/V5 core). Outputs `data/biodiversity_verdict.csv`, `data/biodiversity_streams.csv`.

**Verdict vs MOMENTUM incumbent:**
- **VALUE_PB PASS** (corr −0.30, survives 70% of mom down-months, +3.9% in mom's worst quartile, standalone Sharpe 1.60, dSharpe +0.45) and **VALUE_PE PASS** (corr −0.04, Sharpe 1.85) — VALUE is THE natural diversifier of a momentum book. Exactly what #1 flagged alive while momentum FLIPPED → a value sleeve would have cushioned the 2025-26 V4/V5 bleed.
- **DT5G_TIMING PASS, corr 0.03** — market-timing is a perfectly orthogonal AXIS to stock-selection; validates why production architecture (DT5G gate × stock book) works.
- **QUALITY_ROIC PASS (marginal)** — orthogonal crisis-insurance, weak standalone (Sharpe 0.24, only pays in CRISIS per #3).
- **RSI / FLOW_CMF / POSITION / PBZ FAIL** — corr 0.38–0.63 with momentum, bleed WITH it (FLOW −3.1% / PBZ −3.06% in mom's worst quartile). Reproduces the F-system "cùng cò súng" species-redundancy reject ([[f_system_protect_v4v5_2026]]) WITHOUT needing the F-system stream.

**Core AMH conclusion (capstone of the 5-part series): the V4/V5 momentum book is a MONOCULTURE currently in its inefficiency phase (#1 momentum FLIP). Its biodiversity-completing partner is VALUE (PB/PE) — negatively correlated, profits in momentum's drawdowns, currently healthy. Adding momentum-flavored signals = zero diversification = book stays fragile to momentum-regime flips.** Caveat: cross-sectional long-short paper streams (style proxies), not the real long-only DT5G-gated book — absolute corr differs but the direction (value diversifies momentum) is robust + matches literature. To screen a real strategy, feed its actual return stream into `biodiversity()`.

**ACTION — Value Sleeve grafted onto REAL V4/V5 (`value_sleeve_test.py`, [REDACTED]09):** reallocate weight w from real prod-spec daily NAV (`data/5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g.csv`) into a transparent DT5G-gated long-only value book (top-quintile PB+PE rank, TC, from edge_panel). Result: adds value improves EVERY metric monotonically. V4: w=0 Sharpe 1.23/Calmar 0.93/MaxDD −23.1% → w=0.3 Sharpe 1.38/Calmar 1.09/−20.9%; OOS Sharpe 1.11→1.24 (not early-years). V5 similar (Sharpe 1.26→1.40). **Grind 2025-09→2026-03 cushion = the in-the-money proof**: book bled −23%(V4)/−20%(V5), value only −16.2%, VNI −0.5% → value bled LESS exactly when momentum was in its inefficiency phase (#1). **3 honesty caveats**: (1) corr(book,value)=+0.64 NOT negative — both long-only DT5G-gated share beta; benefit is value's higher standalone Sharpe(1.35)+better skew(Sortino 2.99)+less grind-bleed, NOT neg-corr (that's a long-SHORT property, lost in long-only); (2) value sleeve = inflated proxy (no capacity/slippage, memory warns +3-12pp) → trust the DELTA+cushion not absolutes; (3) monotonic-to-50% = in-sample greed. **RECOMMENDATION: ~25-30% value sleeve (PE-primary per #1), gated DT5G. Before deploy: real capacity-modeled value book, walk-forward the weight, test UNGATED value variant (#3: value profits IN crisis, gating to cash may cut its best moments).** Results `data/value_sleeve_results.csv`.

**AMH SERIES COMPLETE (#1-#5, all [REDACTED]09):** #1 Edge Health Monitor (rolling IC; momentum FLIPPED, value alive) → #2 Vol-target (REJECTED — redundant with DT5G) → #3 Fitness Matrix (value all-weather, quality=CRISIS-only, momentum=good-times) → #4 Ecology Dashboard (mood PROCYCLICAL not contrarian; = fragility gauge; NOW narrow-breadth divergence) → #5 Biodiversity (value = the missing diversifier). **Convergent thread: the production momentum book is a fragile monoculture in a momentum-inefficiency regime; the unanimous fix across all 5 lenses = add a VALUE sleeve.** Files: edge_health_monitor.py, voltarget_overlay.py, fitness_matrix.py, ecology_dashboard.py, biodiversity_test.py.
