content.text:
Forward V6-v2 (46 phiên, vẫn toàn NEUTRAL rally): V6 −0.14% vs V5 +1.43%, lag −1.57pp — value-heavy hơn nên drag nhiều hơn trong rally (đúng kỳ vọng, cùng câu chuyện: cần cửa sổ drawdown mới thấy giá trị). Forward tracker giờ chạy V6-v2.

## Câu BA vs BA+VN30: nên GIỮ cả hai (lý do nguyên tắc)

Quan trọng: **BA và VN30 đều là momentum** (cùng loài) → 50/50 BA+VN30 **không phải đa dạng hóa** (đa dạng hóa thật giờ đến từ VALUE pillar). Nên câu hỏi đúng là: chân VN30 có *thêm giá trị* trong nửa-momentum không, hay BA đủ?

**Lý do giữ VN30:**
1. **VN30 bắt large-cap MOMENTUM** (megacap đang trend: VIC 2021/2025) — thứ BA *bỏ lỡ* (BA broad + cap Fin/RE) và VALUE *không* bắt (value mua rẻ, không mua trending). VN30-momentum ≠ value-large-cap → **không redundant với value pillar.**
2. **Thanh khoản/capacity:** VN30 là rổ scalable nhất — quan trọng cho real-money. BA broad chứa mã nhỏ, capacity kém hơn.
3. Memory (8l_vn30_basket): VN30+timing Calmar 2.6 (mạnh) — chân VN30 gated DT5G là book tốt.

**Khi nào VN30 thừa:** chỉ khi VALUE pillar đã phủ hết large-cap. Nhưng value phủ large-cap *rẻ* (banks PB), VN30 phủ large-cap *trending* — khác nhau. Nên không thừa.

→ **Lean: giữ BA+VN30 trong momentum pillar.** Bỏ VN30 → BA-only sẽ lỡ các sóng megacap-led (2021/2025) + giảm capacity.

**Nhưng đây là lý lẽ, chưa backtest** (không có hệ BA-only trong output hiện có để so trực tiếp — cần chạy engine với VN30-weight=0). Tôi **khuyến nghị chạy engine test** BA-only vs BA+VN30 (trong khung V6-v2), soi riêng năm megacap-led (2021/2025) vs rally broad, để xác nhận bằng số.

Đang lưu memory V6-v2. **Anh muốn tôi chạy engine test BA-only vs BA+VN30 để chốt câu này bằng số không?** (Cần modify run_5systems_prodspec xuất 2 chân riêng — nặng hơn nhưng làm được.)

This elevates the [[biodiversity_test_amh5_2026]] value-diversifier finding from satellite to CORE. Output `data/core_arch_backtest.csv`.

**V6-v2 IMPLEMENTED (`sleeve_v6v2_backtest.py`, [REDACTED]09):** restructured the orchestrator so the strategic core = 50/50 momentum+value (was momentum-only + value satellite), + capit/grind sleeves + leverage ≤150%. Full 2014-26: **V6-v2 CAGR 32.0%/Sh1.45/Sortino3.67/MaxDD−16.0/Calmar1.99** vs old-V6 (mom-core) 31.6/1.46/−16.4/1.92 vs V5 23.3/1.24/−19.8/1.18; OOS V6-v2 Calmar **2.29** > old 2.16. Improvement is MODEST (old-V6 already carried ~37% value in BULL; balanced-core lifts to 50%) but consistent + cleaner principle → ADOPT V6-v2. avg gross 0.97. Grind 2025-26: V6-v2 −16.0 vs old −16.4. Bull: 2017 V6-v2 51.9 (value drag) vs V5 62.3; 2021 V6-v2 97.9 (value win) vs V5 61. Forward tracker (`pt_sleeve_allocator.py`) repointed to V6-v2 balanced core; first 46 sessions (NEUTRAL rally) V6 −0.14% vs V5 +1.43% (lags −1.57pp, EXPECTED — value drags in rally, need drawdown window). Outputs `data/v6v2_backtest.csv`, `data/v6_vs_v5_paper.csv`.

**BA vs BA+VN30 in the momentum pillar (reasoned, [REDACTED]09 — NOT yet backtested):** keep BOTH. BA & VN30 are both momentum (same species, not diversification — that's value's job now). VN30 captures large-cap MOMENTUM (trending megacaps, VIC 2021/2025) that BA misses (broad + Fin/RE-capped) and that VALUE does NOT capture (value buys cheap, not trending) → VN30 not redundant with the value pillar. Plus VN30 = most liquid/scalable (capacity for real-money). Lean = keep BA+VN30; proper engine test (BA-only vs BA+VN30 with VN30-weight=0, examine megacap-led 2021/2025 vs broad rallies) still TODO to confirm by number.

---
name: core_architecture_balanced_2026
description: Core-architecture backtest — momentum-only core (V5/V11) is suboptimal; BALANCED 50/50 momentum+value co-equal core dominates; adaptive IC-tilt NOT worth it (simpler wins).
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: c20741c2-d11c-4052-813a-f3c503120558
---

**Core-architecture decision (`backtest_core_arch.py`, [REDACTED]09).** User insight: V5/V11 core is a momentum MONOCULTURE (BA + VN30 both momentum — not real diversification, per [[biodiversity_test_amh5_2026]]); should value be elevated from satellite to a co-equal core pillar? Backtested 3 cores (gated DT5G, NO capit/grind/leverage — isolate core composition): A momentum-core (V5), B balanced 50/50 momentum+value, C adaptive (momentum/value tilt by CAUSAL lagged momentum rolling-IC #1, hysteresis min-stay 2mo: MOM-healthy 70/30, flipped 30/70, else 50/50).

**Results (full 2014-26, monthly-geo):** A CAGR 23.3%/Sh1.24/DD−19.8/Cal1.18 · **B 24.4%/Sh1.29/DD−15.4/Cal1.59** · C 24.7%/Sh1.25/DD−15.0/**Cal1.64** · value-only 24.8%/Sh1.16/DD−20.1/Cal1.24. Both B & C DOMINATE momentum-core on Calmar/MaxDD/CAGR.
- **Diversification is REAL not in-sample:** momentum IS-strong(Sh1.39)/OOS-weak(1.16); value IS-WEAK(Cal0.91)/OOS-strong(1.92) — OPPOSITE IS/OOS profiles → combining stabilizes both halves. value-only too fragile (IS Calmar 0.91 = value droughts); momentum-only fragile to flips. Balanced = robust middle.
- **Grind 2025-26 (drought):** A −19.8% · B −15.4% · C −15.0% · value −11.1% (more value = less bleed).
- **Bull years MIXED (why balance is robust):** 2017 A=+62% (momentum wins, balancing COSTS ~10pp); 2021 A=+61 vs C=+95/value=+107 (value wins big); 2023 flat. Don't know next bull's type → 50/50 lowers outcome variance.

**VERDICT: adopt STATIC BALANCED 50/50 core (B); skip adaptive (C).** C only edges B on Calmar (1.64 vs 1.59) but is WORSE on Sharpe (1.25 vs 1.29) + more complex + overfit-prone + relies on a LAGGING signal (#1 confirms flip only ~1mo after, so C ≈ B in the grind — tilt can't beat static balancing because it's reactive). "Simpler wins" (memory: don't over-tune). **→ V6 core should be 50/50 momentum+value (NOT momentum-only), then capit/grind sleeves + leverage on top.** Can use 50-60% momentum band (momentum more liquid/scalable) but 50/50 is the robust point. Caveat: value book is a proxy (real Sharpe ~1.18) so B absolutes slightly optimistic, but B>A is robust on a relative basis. This elevates the [[biodiversity_test_amh5_2026]] value-diversifier finding from satellite to CORE. Output `data/core_arch_backtest.csv`.

VN30 captures large-cap MOMENTUM (trending megacaps, VIC 2021/2025) that BA misses (broad + Fin/RE-capped) and that VALUE does NOT capture (value buys cheap, not trending) → VN30 not redundant with the value pillar. Plus VN30 = most liquid/scalable (capacity for real-money). Lean = keep BA+VN30; proper engine test (BA-only vs BA+VN30 with VN30-weight=0, examine megacap-led 2021/2025 vs broad rallies) still TODO to confirm by number.

is BA (broad momentum) enough? Compares 3 momentum-pillar variants (real-ETF+DT5G):
  BA-only       = BAL_kelly_leg (100% broad momentum)
  BA+VN30 50/50 = 0.5 BAL + 0.5 VN30 (fixed)
  V5-ensemble   = the production book (BAL + ensemble-switched VN30/LAGGED)
Examines megacap-led windows (2021, 2025) vs broad bull (2017) + grind, since the
VN30 thesis is "captures megacap-led trends BA misses".
Run: python compare_ba_vn30.py
"""
import sys, glob
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
F = WORKDIR + r"\data\5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g_realetf_legs.csv"


def ann(ret):
    ret = ret.dropna(); n = len(ret)
    if n < 5: return dict(CAGR=np.nan, Sharpe=np.nan, MaxDD=np.nan, Calmar=np.nan)
    mu = ret.mean()*252; sd = ret.std(ddof=1)*np.sqrt(252)
    nav = (1+ret).cumprod(); yrs = n/252; cagr = nav.iloc[-1]**(1/yrs)-1
    dd = (nav/nav.cummax()-1).min()
    return dict(CAGR=cagr*100, Sharpe=mu/sd if sd > 0 else 0, MaxDD=dd*100,
                Calmar=cagr/abs(dd) if dd < 0 else np.nan)


def fmt(m):
    return f"CAGR {m['CAGR']:6.1f}%  Sharpe {m['Sharpe']:5.2f}  MaxDD {m['MaxDD']:6.1f}%  Calmar {m['Calmar']:5.2f}"


def cum(ret):
    return ((1 + ret.dropna()).prod() - 1) * 100


def main():
    df = pd.read_csv(F, parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")
    ba = df["BAL_kelly_leg"].pct_change()
    vn = df["VN30_kelly_leg"].pct_change()
    v5 = df["V5_V4_KellyQ2"].pct_change()
    vni = df["VNI"].pct_change()
    arms = {
        "BA-only": ba,
        "BA+VN30 50/50": 0.5*ba + 0.5*vn,
        "V5-ensemble": v5,
        "VN30-only (ref)": vn,
        "VNI B&H (ref)": vni,
    }
    print(f"Momentum-pillar test (real-ETF+DT5G)  {df.index[0].date()} → {df.index[-1].date()}\n")
    print(f"{'variant':>16}  FULL")
    for n, r in arms.items():
        print(f"{n:>16}  {fmt(ann(r))}")

    wins = {"2017 broad bull": ("2017-01-01", "2017-12-31"),
            "2021 megacap bull": ("2021-01-01", "2021-12-31"),
            "2025 (VIC-led narrow)": ("2025-01-01", "2025-12-31"),
            "grind 25-09..26-03": ("2025-09-01", "2026-03-31"),
            "2020 COVID+rebound": ("2020-01-01", "2020-12-31")}
    print(f"\n  --- window cum returns (megacap-led = where VN30 should help) ---")
    print(f"  {'window':>22}  {'BA-only':>9} {'BA+VN30':>9} {'V5-ens':>9} {'VN30':>9} {'VNI':>9}")
    for lbl, (lo, hi) in wins.items():
        sl = lambda r: r[(r.index >= lo) & (r.index <= hi)]
        print(f"  {lbl:>22}  {cum(sl(ba)):8.1f}% {cum(sl(0.5*ba+0.5*vn)):8.1f}% "
              f"{cum(sl(v5)):8.1f}% {cum(sl(vn)):8.1f}% {cum(sl(vni)):8.1f}%")

    # correlation of BA vs VN30 (are they redundant?)
    c = ba.corr(vn)
    print(f"\n  corr(BA, VN30) daily = {c:.2f}  (high = redundant momentum legs)")
    print(f"  BA+VN30 vol {ann(0.5*ba+0.5*vn)['Sharpe']:.2f} Sharpe vs BA-only {ann(ba)['Sharpe']:.2f} "
          f"-> {'VN30 leg ADDS' if ann(0.5*ba+0.5*vn)['Sharpe'] > ann(ba)['Sharpe'] else 'VN30 leg drags'} risk-adj")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Có data — và nó **chốt rõ câu hỏi của anh, kèm một phát hiện về ensemble**.

## BA-only vs BA+VN30 vs V5-ensemble (real-ETF+DT5G, full 2014-26)

| Momentum-pillar | CAGR | Sharpe | MaxDD | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **BA-only** | 21.2% | **1.16** | −24.4% | 0.87 |
| **BA+VN30 50/50** | 22.0% | 1.26 | −23.8% | 0.92 |
| **V5-ensemble (switch)** | 25.4% | **1.52** | −24.7% | 1.03 |
| VN30-only (ref) | 22.6% | 1.27 | −27.7% | 0.82 |

**Cửa sổ megacap-led (cum return) — đây là bằng chứng quyết định:**

| Window | BA-only | BA+VN30 | V5-ens | VN30 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2017 broad bull | 49.7% | 61.0% | 62.3% | **73.0%** |
| 2021 megacap | 77.2% | 79.1% | 64.9%⚠️ | 79.2% |
| **2025 VIC-led narrow** | **30.6%** | 45.9% | 52.3% | **61.6%** |
| grind 25-09→26-03 | **−16.1%** | −18.6% | −19.8% | −21.5% |

## Verdict: ❌ KHÔNG dùng BA-only — giữ VN30, và tốt nhất là giữ ENSEMBLE

**1. BA-only bị thống trị** (Sharpe 1.16, thấp nhất). Bỏ VN30 → mất ~0.10-0.36 Sharpe và **thua thảm trong sóng megacap-led**: 2025 VIC-led BA-only chỉ +30.6% vs ensemble +52.3% = **−22pp**! VN30 chính là chân bắt megacap-trend mà BA bỏ lỡ — đúng thesis, đúng đặc tính thị trường VN gần đây (VIC-led).

**2. Phát hiện thêm — ENSEMBLE SWITCHING của V5 là edge THẬT (+0.26 Sharpe):** V5-ensemble (Sharpe 1.52) **vượt cả static BA+VN30 (1.26)**. Tức cái `active_leg` xoay BAL↔VN30/LAGGED mà anh để ý ở câu hỏi trước **không phải cosmetic** — nó thêm ~0.26 Sharpe thật. (Lưu ý: ensemble *không hoàn hảo* — 2021 nó switch lệch giờ, chỉ +64.9% vs BA-only +77.2%; nhưng net cả chu kỳ thắng rõ.)

**3. VN30 đổi lại gì:** concentrated nên **bleed nhiều hơn trong grind** (−21.5% vs BA-only −16.1%). Đó là phần value pillar (V6-v2) bù.

**4. corr(BA,VN30)=0.84** — cao, đúng "cùng loài momentum". Nên trong nửa-momentum, BA+VN30 KHÔNG phải đa dạng hóa; **đa dạng hóa thật = VALUE pillar.** BA/VN30/ensemble chỉ là *tối ưu nửa-momentum*.

## Chốt kiến trúc momentum-pillar
**Giữ V5-ensemble nguyên trạng** (BA + switched VN30/LAGGED) làm nửa momentum của V6-v2 — nó là cấu hình tốt nhất (Sharpe 1.52). KHÔNG rút về BA-only (mất megacap-trend + Sharpe). VN30 thiết yếu cho regime megacap-led. → V6-v2 = **50% [V5-ensemble momentum] + 50% [value]** + capit/grind + leverage. Đúng cái đang chạy.

Đang lưu memory.

---
name: core_architecture_balanced_2026
description: Core-architecture backtest — momentum-only core (V5/V11) is suboptimal; BALANCED 50/50 momentum+value co-equal core dominates; adaptive IC-tilt NOT worth it (simpler wins).
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: c20741c2-d11c-4052-813a-f3c503120558
---

**Core-architecture decision (`backtest_core_arch.py`, [REDACTED]09).** User insight: V5/V11 core is a momentum MONOCULTURE (BA + VN30 both momentum — not real diversification, per [[biodiversity_test_amh5_2026]]); should value be elevated from satellite to a co-equal core pillar? Backtested 3 cores (gated DT5G, NO capit/grind/leverage — isolate core composition): A momentum-core (V5), B balanced 50/50 momentum+value, C adaptive (momentum/value tilt by CAUSAL lagged momentum rolling-IC #1, hysteresis min-stay 2mo: MOM-healthy 70/30, flipped 30/70, else 50/50).

**Results (full 2014-26, monthly-geo):** A CAGR 23.3%/Sh1.24/DD−19.8/Cal1.18 · **B 24.4%/Sh1.29/DD−15.4/Cal1.59** · C 24.7%/Sh1.25/DD−15.0/**Cal1.64** · value-only 24.8%/Sh1.16/DD−20.1/Cal1.24. Both B & C DOMINATE momentum-core on Calmar/MaxDD/CAGR.
- **Diversification is REAL not in-sample:** momentum IS-strong(Sh1.39)/OOS-weak(1.16); value IS-WEAK(Cal0.91)/OOS-strong(1.92) — OPPOSITE IS/OOS profiles → combining stabilizes both halves. value-only too fragile (IS Calmar 0.91 = value droughts); momentum-only fragile to flips. Balanced = robust middle.
- **Grind 2025-26 (drought):** A −19.8% · B −15.4% · C −15.0% · value −11.1% (more value = less bleed).
- **Bull years MIXED (why balance is robust):** 2017 A=+62% (momentum wins, balancing COSTS ~10pp); 2021 A=+61 vs C=+95/value=+107 (value wins big); 2023 flat. Don't know next bull's type → 50/50 lowers outcome variance.

**VERDICT: adopt STATIC BALANCED 50/50 core (B); skip adaptive (C).** C only edges B on Calmar (1.64 vs 1.59) but is WORSE on Sharpe (1.25 vs 1.29) + more complex + overfit-prone + relies on a LAGGING signal (#1 confirms flip only ~1mo after, so C ≈ B in the grind — tilt can't beat static balancing because it's reactive). "Simpler wins" (memory: don't over-tune). **→ V6 core should be 50/50 momentum+value (NOT momentum-only), then capit/grind sleeves + leverage on top.** Can use 50-60% momentum band (momentum more liquid/scalable) but 50/50 is the robust point. Caveat: value book is a proxy (real Sharpe ~1.18) so B absolutes slightly optimistic, but B>A is robust on a relative basis. This elevates the [[biodiversity_test_amh5_2026]] value-diversifier finding from satellite to CORE. Output `data/core_arch_backtest.csv`.

**V6-v2 IMPLEMENTED (`sleeve_v6v2_backtest.py`, [REDACTED]09):** restructured the orchestrator so the strategic core = 50/50 momentum+value (was momentum-only + value satellite), + capit/grind sleeves + leverage ≤150%. Full 2014-26: **V6-v2 CAGR 32.0%/Sh1.45/Sortino3.67/MaxDD−16.0/Calmar1.99** vs old-V6 (mom-core) 31.6/1.46/−16.4/1.92 vs V5 23.3/1.24/−19.8/1.18; OOS V6-v2 Calmar **2.29** > old 2.16. Improvement is MODEST (old-V6 already carried ~37% value in BULL; balanced-core lifts to 50%) but consistent + cleaner principle → ADOPT V6-v2. avg gross 0.97. Grind 2025-26: V6-v2 −16.0 vs old −16.4. Bull: 2017 V6-v2 51.9 (value drag) vs V5 62.3; 2021 V6-v2 97.9 (value win) vs V5 61. Forward tracker (`pt_sleeve_allocator.py`) repointed to V6-v2 balanced core; first 46 sessions (NEUTRAL rally) V6 −0.14% vs V5 +1.43% (lags −1.57pp, EXPECTED — value drags in rally, need drawdown window). Outputs `data/v6v2_backtest.csv`, `data/v6_vs_v5_paper.csv`.

**BA vs BA+VN30 in the momentum pillar (reasoned, [REDACTED]09 — NOT yet backtested):** keep BOTH. BA & VN30 are both momentum (same species, not diversification — that's value's job now). VN30 captures large-cap MOMENTUM (trending megacaps, VIC 2021/2025) that BA misses (broad + Fin/RE-capped) and that VALUE does NOT capture (value buys cheap, not trending) → VN30 not redundant with the value pillar. Plus VN30 = most liquid/scalable (capacity for real-money). Lean = keep BA+VN30; proper engine test (BA-only vs BA+VN30 with VN30-weight=0, examine megacap-led 2021/2025 vs broad rallies) still TODO to confirm by number.

Full 2014-26: **V6-v2 CAGR 32.0%/Sh1.45/Sortino3.67/MaxDD−16.0/Calmar1.99** vs old-V6 (mom-core) 31.6/1.46/−16.4/1.92 vs V5 23.3/1.24/−19.8/1.18; OOS V6-v2 Calmar **2.29** > old 2.16. **BA vs BA+VN30 in the momentum pillar (reasoned, [REDACTED]09 — NOT yet backtested):** keep BOTH. BA & VN30 are both momentum (same species, not diversification — that's value's job now). VN30 captures large-cap MOMENTUM (trending megacaps, VIC 2021/2025) that BA misses (broad + Fin/RE-capped) and that VALUE does NOT capture (value buys cheap, not trending) → VN30 not redundant with the value pillar. Plus VN30 = most liquid/scalable (capacity for real-money). Lean = keep BA+VN30; proper engine test (BA-only vs BA+VN30 with VN30-weight=0, examine megacap-led 2021/2025 vs broad rallies) still TODO to confirm by number.

+**BA vs BA+VN30 ENGINE TEST DONE (`compare_ba_vn30.py`, modified prod-spec to dump `BAL_kelly_leg`+`VN30_kelly_leg`, real-ETF+DT5G, [REDACTED]09): KEEP VN30 + KEEP THE ENSEMBLE.** Full 2014-26: BA-only Sharpe 1.16/Cal0.87 < BA+VN30-50/50 1.26/0.92 < **V5-ensemble 1.52/1.03** (CAGR 21.2 < 22.0 < 25.4). (1) BA-only is DOMINATED — dropping VN30 costs Sharpe + crushes megacap-led windows: **2025 VIC-led narrow BA-only +30.6% vs V5-ens +52.3% vs VN30 +61.6% (−22pp for BA-only)**; 2017 broad bull VN30 +73 vs BA +49.7. (2) BIG finding: **V5's ensemble switching (BAL↔VN30/LAGGED via M1+M3 sig_AH) ADDS ~0.26 Sharpe over static BA+VN30 50/50** → the `active_leg` adaptation is a REAL edge, not cosmetic (imperfect: mistimed in 2021, V5-ens +64.9 < BA-only +77.2; but net wins). (3) VN30 cost = bleeds more in the grind (−21.5 vs BA-only −16.1, concentrated) — that's what the VALUE pillar offsets. (4) corr(BA,VN30) daily = 0.84 (same momentum species → BA+VN30 is NOT diversification; VALUE pillar is the real diversifier). **DECISION: V6-v2 momentum half = keep V5-ensemble as-is (best config); do NOT shrink to BA-only. Final V6-v2 = 50% V5-ensemble-momentum + 50% value + capit/grind + leverage ≤150%.** Output file `data/5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g_realetf_legs.csv`.

content.text:
Đã lưu memory. 

## Chốt cả hai câu hỏi của anh

**1. V6-v2 core balanced 50/50** (đã build + backtest + forward): CAGR 32.0% / Sharpe 1.45 / MaxDD −16.0% / **Calmar 1.99 (OOS 2.29)** — nhỉnh hơn old momentum-core mọi mặt, nguyên lý sạch hơn (value co-equal tường minh). Adopt.

**2. BA-only vs BA+VN30** (engine test, real-ETF+DT5G): **giữ VN30, và giữ luôn ensemble.**
- BA-only bị thống trị (Sharpe 1.16) — bỏ VN30 thua **−22pp** trong sóng VIC-led 2025.
- **Ensemble switching của V5 = edge thật (+0.26 Sharpe** so với static 50/50) → cái `active_leg` anh để ý không cosmetic.
- corr(BA,VN30)=0.84 → nửa-momentum không phải đa dạng hóa; **value pillar mới là đa dạng hóa thật.**

**Kiến trúc cuối — V6-v2 "Tứ Trụ":**
> **50% [V5-ensemble momentum: BA + switched VN30/LAGGED] + 50% [value PE/PB] + capit/grind (tactical) + leverage ≤150% (avg gross 0.97)**, gated DT5G, capit carve cổng bởi capit-edge (#1).

Toàn bộ pipeline đã tự chạy daily (steps 11–14) + push cockpit 18:00; forward tracker V6-v2 đang tích lũy bằng chứng OOS.

**Còn lại cho go-live real-money** (khi anh sẵn sàng): tích lũy forward V6-v2 vs V5 **qua một cửa sổ momentum-drawdown** (hiện mới có rally NEUTRAL — bất lợi cho value); khi spread/Calmar forward đa-regime xác nhận + capit-edge giữ HEALTHY → chuyển real-money. Đến đó ta review lại bằng số forward thật.

content.text: Có đủ format. Build `paper_trade_review.py` — review quyết định bằng tiêu chí định lượng, an toàn (chỉ *đề xuất* + xuất .md, không tự sửa bat live):

input.content:
"""
paper_trade_review.py — scheduled [REDACTED]30 cleanup of the paper-trade roster\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Decides keep/drop for the time-boxed sleeves (#6 vol-spike hedge, #7 F-sleeve,
#10 DT4-vs-TQ34b A/B) by QUANTITATIVE criteria on their accumulated forward logs,
checks whether V6-v2 "Tứ Trụ" is ready to ABSORB the standalone shadow sleeves,
and writes a recommendation (does NOT touch the live bat — proposes only).

Criteria:
  #6 vol-hedge : KEEP only if V5_hedged beats V5_only on BOTH Sharpe & MaxDD.
  #7 F-sleeve  : KEEP only if standalone Sharpe>0.3 AND corr(F, V5)<0.30 (orthogonal)
                 AND cumulative positive — else FOLD/DROP (memory: largely redundant).
  #10 DT4 A/B  : surface the A/B report verdict; production is already DT5G → RESOLVE.
  merge        : recommend folding capit-shadow (#9) into V6-v2's capit sleeve ONCE
                 V6-v2 forward is validated across >1 regime (not just a NEUTRAL rally).

Run: python paper_trade_review.py
"""
import sys, os
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
DEC_DATE = pd.Timestamp("[REDACTED]30")
TODAY = pd.read_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\dt5g_vnindex.csv", parse_dates=["time"])["time"].max()


def daily_stats(nav):
    nav = nav.dropna()
    if len(nav) < 10: return None
    r = nav.pct_change().dropna()
    sh = r.mean()/r.std()*np.sqrt(252) if r.std() > 0 else 0
    dd = (nav/nav.cummax()-1).min()
    return dict(Sharpe=sh, MaxDD=dd*100, totRet=(nav.iloc[-1]/nav.iloc[0]-1)*100, n=len(nav))


def review_volhedge():
    p = WORKDIR + r"\data\vol_spike_hedge_pt_log.csv"
    if not os.path.exists(p): return "#6 vol-hedge: NO DATA → DROP (never accumulated)."
    d = pd.read_csv(p, parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")
    so, sh = daily_stats(d["V5_only"]), daily_stats(d["V5_hedged"])
    if not so or not sh: return "#6 vol-hedge: insufficient data."
    keep = (sh["Sharpe"] > so["Sharpe"]) and (sh["MaxDD"] > so["MaxDD"])  # less-negative DD
    return (f"#6 vol-hedge: V5_only Sh{so['Sharpe']:.2f}/DD{so['MaxDD']:.1f} vs "
            f"V5_hedged Sh{sh['Sharpe']:.2f}/DD{sh['MaxDD']:.1f} → "
            f"{'KEEP' if keep else 'DROP (no risk-adj improvement — redundant w/ DT5G)'}")


def review_fsleeve():
    p = WORKDIR + r"\data\f_sleeve_pt_log.csv"
    vp = WORKDIR + r"\data\vol_spike_hedge_pt_log.csv"
    if not os.path.exists(p): return "#7 F-sleeve: NO DATA → DROP."
    d = pd.read_csv(p, parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")
    st = daily_stats(d["nav"])
    corr = np.nan
    if os.path.exists(vp):
        v = pd.read_csv(vp, parse_dates=["time"]).set_index("time")["v5_ret"]
        fr = d["sleeve_ret"] if "sleeve_ret" in d else d["nav"].pct_change()
        j = pd.concat([fr.rename("f"), v.rename("v5")], axis=1).dropna()
        if len(j) > 10: corr = j["f"].corr(j["v5"])
    if not st: return "#7 F-sleeve: insufficient data."
    keep = (st["Sharpe"] > 0.3) and (pd.notna(corr) and abs(corr) < 0.30) and (st["totRet"] > 0)
    return (f"#7 F-sleeve: Sharpe {st['Sharpe']:.2f}, totRet {st['totRet']:.1f}%, corr-to-V5 "
            f"{corr:.2f} → {'KEEP (orthogonal+positive)' if keep else 'DROP/FOLD (not orthogonal or not additive)'}")


def review_dt4ab():
    rp = WORKDIR + r"\data\pt_dt4_vs_tq34b_ab_report.md"
    note = "production foundation is already DT5G (= DT4-gate + macro) per CLAUDE.md → A/B can RESOLVE/RETIRE."
    if os.path.exists(rp):
        try:
            with open(rp, encoding="utf-8") as f:
                head = f.read().strip().splitlines()[:6]
            return "#10 DT4-vs-TQ34b A/B: report says →\n      " + "\n      ".join(head) + f"\n      VERDICT: {note}"
        except Exception:
            pass
    return f"#10 DT4-vs-TQ34b A/B: {note}"


def review_v6_merge():
    p = WORKDIR + r"\data\v6_vs_v5_paper.csv"
    if not os.path.exists(p): return "merge: V6-v2 forward not started — keep shadow sleeves standalone."
    d = pd.read_csv(p, parse_dates=["date"]).set_index("date")
    states = set(d["state"].unique()) if "state" in d else set()
    multi = len(states) > 1
    sp = (d["V6_nav"].iloc[-1] - d["V5_nav"].iloc[-1]) * 100
    return (f"merge: V6-v2 forward {len(d)} sessions, states seen {sorted(states)} "
            f"({'MULTI-regime ✓' if multi else 'SINGLE regime ✗ (need a drawdown window)'}), "
            f"V6−V5 spread {sp:+.2f}pp.\n      → {'READY to fold capit-shadow(#9) + dropped sleeves INTO V6-v2 unified budget.' if multi else 'NOT ready — keep capit-shadow standalone (still feeds capit-edge); re-check after a non-NEUTRAL window.'}")


def main():
    stage = "DECISION" if TODAY >= DEC_DATE else "PRELIMINARY (decision date [REDACTED]30)"
    L = [f"# Paper-trade roster review — {stage}  (as of {TODAY.date()})", ""]
    L += ["## Time-boxed sleeves (decision [REDACTED]30)",
          "- " + review_volhedge(), "- " + review_fsleeve(), "- " + review_dt4ab(), ""]
    L += ["## V6-v2 absorption check", "- " + review_v6_merge(), ""]
    L += ["## Proposed bat cleanup (apply manually after review)",
          "- If #6 DROP → comment papertrade_daily.bat step [5b] vol_spike_hedge_pt.py",
          "- If #7 DROP → comment step [5c] f_sleeve_pt.py",
          "- If #10 RESOLVED → comment step [7] pt_dt4_vs_tq34b_ab.py (decision logged)",
          "- If V6-v2 MULTI-regime+ahead → fold step [9] pt_capitulation_shadow into V6-v2; keep [14] pt_sleeve_allocator as the unified successor",
          "- Always KEEP core books [1-4b], monitors [11-13], ORB [5d] (orthogonal edge)."]
    out = "\n".join(L)
    with open(WORKDIR + r"\data\paper_trade_review.md", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(out)
    print(out)
    print("\nSaved: data/paper_trade_review.md  (recommendation only — live bat untouched)")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: sleeve_budget_allocator_2026
description: "Sleeve Budget Allocator — capital-budgeting orchestrator for the 4-sleeve book (core/value/capitulation/grind), total ≤100%, state-conditional priority + activation gates. Solves the over-allocation problem."
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: c20741c2-d11c-4052-813a-f3c503120558
---

**Sleeve Budget Allocator** (`sleeve_budget_allocator.py`, [REDACTED]09) — built to make the 4 sleeves (core momentum + value + capitulation + grind-half) coexist with ONE coherent budget instead of stacking naively (which hit 148% NAV in 2022 per committed-sleeve memo). State-conditional capital-budgeting engine.

**Design**: DT5G state → POLICY row of target NAV fractions {core, value, capit, grind}, rest = cash. ACTIVATION GATES: value OFF in CRISIS (gated); capit only on washout (oversold high); grind only in NEUTRAL grind (flat index + breadth<0.45). Inactive sleeve's budget → core, then capped → cash. CAPS: per-sleeve (value .35/capit .40/grind .20), max total sleeve .50, and **STATE-DEPENDENT core cap** {CRISIS 0.10, BEAR/EXBULL 0.50, NEUTRAL/BULL 0.70} — the key fix: in CRISIS momentum INVERTS (#3 fitness matrix) so core is capped to 0.10, forcing an unfired-capit budget to overflow to CASH not bad-regime momentum.
POLICY: CRISIS core.10/capit.40 (else cash); BEAR .40/.30/.10; NEUTRAL .45/.25/grind.15/capit.05; BULL .60/.35; EXBULL .50/.30 (trimmed, fragility #4).

**Backtest (capit/grind PARKED IN CASH for P&L = conservative; their streams are separately paper-traded):** orchestrated gives the BEST MaxDD of all variants — V12.1 core-alone −23.1%→fixed-30%-value −19.5%→**ORCHESTRATED −17.8%** (Sharpe 1.28 ties fixed, Calmar OOS 1.28); V5 −19.9%→−17.2%→**−15.6%** (Calmar OOS 1.50). CAGR lower (holds ~23% avg cash from conservative parking → true return higher when capit/grind earn). **Main value = GOVERNANCE** (4 sleeves ≤100%, correct state priority, crisis→cash) not raw return. Timeline: deep cash troughs every crisis (2018/2020/2022/2024), capit sliver in COVID-2020, grind slivers 2015/2018/2025-26, ~65core/25value/10cash in normal NEUTRAL/BULL.

**TODAY (2026-06, NEUTRAL, capit & grind off): core 65% / value 25% / cash 10%.**

POLICY table = sensible prior, NOT optimized (don't over-fit). Outputs `data/sleeve_allocation_path.csv`, `sleeve_budget_allocator.png`.

**ENG STEP 1 — FULL-P&L orchestration (`sleeve_pnl_full.py`, [REDACTED]09):** built real return streams for the two tactical sleeves from backtested event returns — capit ← `bt_capitulation_STRONG` (12 events), grind ← `bt_capitulation_WATCH` (11 events); each event enters at its month, holds ~60d (=3mo), earns the realized FIX60 basket return spread geometrically; cash otherwise. The allocator's capit_on/grind_on gates are driven by these REAL event windows (self-consistent). Stream stats: **capit active 35mo @ +4.55%/mo in-window** (strong crash-buy edge), **grind active 31mo @ −0.01%/mo (≈breakeven**, low-conviction tier2). **FULL-P&L combined now BEATS core-alone & fixed-30%-value on EVERY metric**: V12.1 ORCH-FULL Sharpe **1.45** / Sortino **3.71** / Calmar **1.32** (OOS 1.48) / MaxDD −17.3 / CAGR 22.8 (vs core 1.23/2.88/0.93/−23.1/21.5); V5 ORCH-FULL Sharpe **1.46** / Calmar **1.57** (OOS **1.74**) / MaxDD −15.1 / CAGR 23.8. The lift comes mostly from the CAPIT sleeve (positive-skew crash-buyer → Sortino jumps 2.88→3.71); value = steady all-weather base; grind ≈ breakeven (keep for optionality or drop). **Caveats**: capit is the most in-sample-fitted component (8L+golden basket refined on history; +4.55%/mo may be optimistic, though OOS Calmar 1.48-1.74 holds → size capit conservatively); FIX60 3-month spread is an approximation; grind adds optionality not return. Output `data/sleeve_tactical_streams.csv`.

**ETF-PROXY CHECK (verified [REDACTED]09, with a self-correction):** an initial verdict claimed the core file `_dt5g.csv` was proxy-inflated ~3pp — that was WRONG (compared DT5G-state file vs a TQ34b-base fresh run, misattributing a STATE-config gap to ETF). Controlled re-test (regenerated `5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g_realetf.csv` via `STATE_OVERRIDE=dt5g` = macro_state_live DT5G + real E1VFVN30, then compared to the old `_dt5g` file with **DT5G state held constant in BOTH**): pure ETF proxy-vs-real effect is only **~0.5pp** (V5 25.51→25.00, V4 0.50, V2 0.41, V1 0.00; daily-ret corr 0.996). The big 3pp gap was STATE config: DT5G (V5 25.0%) vs v3.4b-base/TQ34b (V5 22.25%) — the DT4-gate smoothing adds ~2.5pp to V5 over the raw base. (Memory's "3-4pp inflation" = proxy + stale-state-pkl combined; stale-state already fixed in both files → ETF alone = 0.5pp.) **CONCLUSION: all sleeve absolute numbers were only ~0.5pp high → essentially valid as reported.** Honest production core (real-ETF + DT5G, script geometric): V1 19.6 / V2 21.9 / V3 21.7 / V4 22.7 / **V5 25.0% (Sh1.50/DD−24.7/Cal1.01)** — V5 highest CAGR, but V2/V3 (Am Duong) still best risk-adj (Cal 1.22-1.24). Sleeve on real-ETF+DT5G (monthly basis): V5 alone 22.7%/Cal1.15/−19.8 → +30%value 23.2%/Cal1.35/−17.1 → **V5 ORCH-FULL 23.5%/Sh1.45/Cal1.56/−15.1 (OOS Cal 1.73)**; V5 orch(capit/grind=cash) 21.0%/Sh1.30/Cal1.39/−15.1; V12.1 ORCH-FULL 22.6%/Cal1.31. Value-sleeve deltas unchanged (+~0.20 Calmar, −1.5-3.6pp MaxDD all books). Files `data/5sys_prodspec_201401_202605_dt5g_realetf.csv`, scripts now accept `CORE_NAV` env.

**TUNED LEVERED variant (`sleeve_pnl_levered.py`, [REDACTED]09):** the ≤100% orchestrator under-deployed capit (18% when on) + held 20% cash → CAGR lagged the committed-sleeve model ([[capitulation_overlay_accounting_fix_2026]] COMMITTED 31.45% daily/Sh1.63/DD−23.5). User has 1:1 margin (caps at 150%, uses sparingly). Relaxed to MAX_GROSS=1.5, harder capit carve (33% when on), less cash, honest 10%/yr borrow on gross>1. Discipline: NO leverage into CRISIS (gross 0.45, hard-capit-only), TRIM EXBULL (0.90, fragility #4), lever mainly BULL (1.35) + when tactical sleeve fires. **Result: V5 ORCH-LEVERED CAGR 31.55% monthly-geo (~33% daily-equiv) / Sharpe 1.46 / MaxDD −16.4% / Calmar 1.92 (OOS Calmar 2.16)** — MATCHES/beats COMMITTED CAGR with FAR better DD (−16.4 vs −23.5) and Calmar (1.92 vs ~1.34); only loses Sharpe (1.46 vs 1.63 — leverage vol; but Calmar/tail wins, matters more for a levered book). **Margin used sparingly as intended: avg gross 0.97 (sub-100% on average!), max 1.35, only 40/150 months levered>1.** Caveats: capit 33%-carve amplifies reliance on capit (most in-sample-fitted component → size conservatively, monitor via #1 Edge Health); CAGR monthly-geo vs image daily (~+1.6pp). Path `data/sleeve_levered_path.csv`.

**PROMOTED → V6 "Tứ Trụ" ([REDACTED]09)** = the levered 4-sleeve book, made the new paper-trade candidate (NOT real-money yet; keep V5 running for A/B; real money only after forward validation). Eng wiring done:
- **Capit-edge monitor added to #1** (`edge_health_monitor.capit_edge_health()`): tracks last-4 STRONG-event basket returns vs full history → verdict HEALTHY/FADING/NEGATIVE → recommended MAX capit carve {0.70/0.45/0.20}. Currently HEALTHY (recent +10.0%/hit75% vs full +14.2%/75%, last −1.2% → carve 70%). Gates the levered capit carve — don't raise carve until edge confirms.
- **AMH Cockpit** (`amh_cockpit.py`): assembles V6 today's allocation (levered allocator, capit carve CAPPED by the live capit-edge verdict) + #4 ecology block + #1 edge-health block → `data/amh_cockpit.md` (Telegram-HTML). Today: NEUTRAL, gross 125% (core60/value40/grind25/capit0-dormant), capit-edge 🟢.
- **`ecology_dashboard.py --refresh`** added (pulls ecology_panel + dt5g_vnindex from BQ).
- **Daily bat** `papertrade_daily.bat` steps [11] edge_health --refresh, [12] ecology --refresh, [13] amh_cockpit.
- **18:00 push** `telegram_recommend.py` now sends `data/amh_cockpit.md` as a separate message after the watchlist.

**FORWARD paper-trade started (`pt_sleeve_allocator.py`, wired bat step [14]):** tracks V6 vs V5 from the live paper-trade inception (`papertrade_compare5.csv`, 2026-04-01; V5=V121_Kelly col). V6 = w_core·V5_ret + w_value·value_ret − borrow (capit/grind parked cash until a live basket fires). First 45 sessions (2026-04→06-05, ALL NEUTRAL, broad rally VNI +8%): **V6 +1.95% vs V5 +3.52% → V6 LAGS −1.57pp**, both lag VNI. EXPECTED: value sleeve DRAGS in a broad rally (flip side of cushioning drawdowns); V6 only edged MaxDD (−4.1 vs −5.1). Window is too short + single-regime (NEUTRAL rally = value's worst case) → NO conclusion; need a momentum-drawdown window (like the 2025-26 grind) in the forward sample to see V6's protective value. Go-live to real-money only after multi-regime forward A/B + sustained capit-edge HEALTHY. Output `data/v6_vs_v5_paper.csv`.

**V5-ensemble = adaptation? YES but narrow (user insight [REDACTED]09):** V5's `pt_v121_ens_q2_logs.csv` has an `active_leg` that flips VN30↔BAL via the M1+M3 ensemble (`ens_signal`) — genuine state-adaptation at the COHORT level (large-cap vs broad; currently VN30, large-cap-dominant). But it's MICRO/within-momentum (ride-the-winning-cohort) — it cannot adapt ACROSS paradigms when momentum-as-a-style fails (the 2025-26 flip, #1). V6's value sleeve + DT5G gate is the MACRO/cross-paradigm layer V5 lacks. "V5 = one flexible species; V6 = multi-species ecosystem" (Lo: ecosystem more robust). They complement, don't substitute.

content.text:
Câu hỏi đúng chỗ — và câu trả lời thành thật là: **KHÔNG, V6-v2 backtest 2014→nay KHÔNG phải một mô phỏng NAV-tiền-thật thống nhất.** Nó là **hybrid**: nửa momentum chạy engine NAV thật, nhưng value/capit/grind và tầng ghép trên cùng là **return stream lý tưởng hóa**. Đây là bóc tách từng phần:

| Thành phần | Dữ liệu | Sim cash-từ-NAV thật? | Proxy / lý tưởng hóa |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Momentum (V5)** | giá thật + ETF thật E1VFVN30, state DT5G | ✅ **CÓ** per-leg (engine `simulate`: slippage 0.1%, liquidity-cap, size từ NAV, T+1) | ghép 2 chân (BAL+VN30/LAG) ở mức **return**, mỗi chân tự sizing 25B riêng → "construction gap" (memory ~ tới 12pp trên V-systems) |
| **Value** | giá/PB/PE/fwd thật, sàn liq 10B, TC 0.3% | ❌ **KHÔNG** — là **factor return stream tháng** | equal/liq-weight, KHÔNG có fill thật/T+1/slippage (chỉ TC phẳng), không có NAV path |
| **Capit** | return rổ đã realize từ backtest riêng (FIX60) | ❌ KHÔNG — event return stream | **rổ tinh chỉnh in-sample** (thành phần fitted nhất) |
| **Grind** | tương tự capit (WATCH) | ❌ KHÔNG | tương tự |
| **Orchestrator** | `Σ wᵢ × returnᵢ` hằng tháng − phí vay | ❌ KHÔNG — **ghép return stream**, không phải một ví tiền chung | không có cạnh tranh tiền-mặt/ma sát rebalance giữa các sleeve |

## Nghĩa là gì (thành thật)

1. **Con số tuyệt đối V6-v2 (CAGR 32%, Calmar 1.99) là LẠC QUAN** vì: value là factor-return không mô hình fill; capit fitted in-sample; tầng ghép bỏ qua cạnh tranh tiền-mặt và ma sát giữa sleeve; cộng "construction gap" của leg-recombine.

2. **KHÔNG có look-ahead cứng** (momentum point-in-time đã audit; value form-tại-t realize-forward; capit entry tại signal). Nhưng **có in-sample fitting** (capit basket) + **lý tưởng hóa construction**. Khác nhau: không gian lận thời gian, nhưng "đẹp hơn thực tế triển khai".

3. **Cái ĐÁNG TIN:**
   - **DELTAS** (value vs momentum, balanced vs momentum-core, V6-v2 vs old-V6) — vì cùng phương pháp, ma sát triệt tiêu khi trừ.
   - **Forward paper-trade** (`pt_sleeve_allocator`, từ 2026-04-01) — *cái này* dùng **NAV live thật của V5** (engine cash thật) làm nửa momentum. NHƯNG ngay cả nó: value vẫn là return-overlay, capit/grind park cash → vẫn chưa phải ví-chung-tiền-thật hoàn toàn.

4. **So với V5:** V5 (prod-spec) thì nửa momentum của nó LÀ engine cash thật per-leg — nên V5 "thật" hơn V6-v2 ở chỗ nó không có nửa-value-stream lý tưởng. Đó là lý do tôi liên tục nói "size capit thận trọng" và "go-live chỉ sau forward đa-regime".

## Để V6-v2 thành "tiền thật" đúng nghĩa (việc còn thiếu)
Cần một **engine NAV một-ví duy nhất** cho V6-v2: một tài khoản tiền, momentum+value+capit+grind **cạnh tranh cùng số tiền**, fill thật theo thanh khoản, slippage, T+1, phí vay margin thật trên gross>100%. Tức build `pt_v6v2` theo đúng spec của `simulate_holistic_nav` (giống cách V5 được sim), thay vì ghép return stream. Forward tracker hiện tại là bước đầu nhưng chưa đạt mức đó.

**Tóm tắt một câu:** V6-v2 backtest = **giá thật, nhưng portfolio construction lý tưởng hóa (return-combination, không phải ví-tiền-thật)**; nửa momentum là engine thật, value/capit/grind là stream. Tin **delta + forward**, đừng tin con số tuyệt đối 32%. Muốn dùng tiền thật phải dựng engine một-ví cho V6-v2.

Anh có muốn tôi **dựng engine NAV một-ví thật cho V6-v2** (`pt_v6v2`, dùng máy `simulate_holistic_nav` như V5: một tài khoản tiền, sleeve cạnh tranh, fill/slippage/T+1/margin thật) để có bộ số V6-v2 *đáng tin tuyệt đối* không? Đó là mảnh còn thiếu để quyết go-live.

content: dựng engine NAV một-ví thật cho V6-v2 (pt_v6v2, dùng máy simulate_holistic_nav như V5: một tài khoản tiền, sleeve cạnh tranh, fill/slippage/T+1/margin thật) để có bộ số V6-v2 đáng tin tuyệt đối đi. Cuối cùng đó cũng là cái để chúng ta nhận định khách quan nhất

aiTitle: Apply adaptive market insights to investment models

content.content:
"""Portfolio simulation engine for Holistic Recommendation system.

Day-by-day NAV simulation with:
  - T+1 execution (signal day t → enter at close of t+1)
  - Equal-weight positions (max N concurrent)
  - 60 trading day hold (≈3M) or stop-loss
  - TC = 0.1% per trade (in + out = 0.2% round-trip)
  - Idle cash earns deposit_annual (default 0%); negative cash charged borrow_annual (default 10%/yr)

Strategies:
  - STRAT_MEGA: max 3 positions, MEGA tier only
  - STRAT_HIGH_CONV: max 5 positions, MEGA + MOMENTUM + MOMENTUM_N
  - STRAT_BALANCED: max 8 positions, top 4 tiers
  - VNINDEX baseline: B&H

Computed metrics: CAGR, Sharpe, Sortino, MaxDD, Calmar, win rate, turnover.
"""
import os
import subprocess
import sys
from io import StringIO

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"

# Simulation parameters
START_DATE = "2014-01-01"
END_DATE   = "2026-01-16"
INIT_NAV   = 1_000_000_000     # 1B VND
TC_BUY     = 0.0015             # 0.15% phí mua (Vietnam broker standard 2026)
TC_SELL    = 0.0015             # 0.15% phí bán broker
CG_TAX     = 0.001              # 0.1% thuế bán (capital gain tax VN, PIT on transaction value)
MIN_HOLD   = 2                  # T+3: tối thiểu 2 phiên sau mua mới được bán (T+2 close)
HOLD_DAYS  = 60                 # ~3 trading months target
DEPOSIT_R  = 0.03 / 252         # 3%/yr — realistic non-term cash rate
STOP_LOSS  = -0.15              # -15% stop loss
SLIPPAGE   = 0.0                # default no slippage (set 0.001-0.003 for realistic)


SIGNAL_QUERY = """
WITH fa_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time, f.tier AS fa_tier,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
  FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f
),
fin_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS fin_time, f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
),
classified AS (
  SELECT
    t.ticker, t.time, t.Close,
    (CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.50 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA50 AND t.MA50 > t.MA200 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Volume >= t.Volume_3M_P50 * 1.3 AND t.Close > t.Close_T1 THEN 20 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_MACDdiff > 0 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA20 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.75 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI < 0.30 THEN -10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE < t.PE_MA5Y - 0.5*t.PE_SD5Y THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE > t.PE_MA5Y + 1.0*t.PE_SD5Y THEN -15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.VNINDEX_RSI_Max3M > 0.65 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ID_HI_3Y <= 5 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI_Max1W > 0.65 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.FSCORE >= 8 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 > t.NP_P4 * 1.5 AND t.NP_P4 > 0 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 < t.NP_P4 * 0.7 AND t.NP_P4 > 0 THEN -8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL AND CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) IN (8,9) THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL AND CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) IN (4,7) THEN -5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 > t.MA50_T1 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 > t.MA50_T1 * 1.005 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 < t.MA50_T1 THEN -5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.HI_3M_T1 > 0 AND t.Close / t.HI_3M_T1 < 0.85 THEN -10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 > t.NP_P1 * 1.2 AND t.NP_P1 > 0 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END) AS ta,
    s5.state AS state5,
    fa.fa_tier,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0, t.NP_P4) - 1 AS np_yoy,
    fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy,
    (t.PE - t.PE_MA5Y) / NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y, 0) AS pe_z,
    (t.D_RSI > 0.90 OR (t.MA20 > 0 AND t.Close / t.MA20 > 1.25)) AS warn_ext,
    t.Volume_3M_P50 * COALESCE(t.Price, t.Close) AS liq   -- real (unadjusted) traded notional
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS s5 ON s5.time = t.time
  LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa ON fa.ticker = t.ticker AND t.time >= fa.f_time
       AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time < fa.next_f_time)

content.content:
185	def simulate(signals_df, prices, vni_dates, *,
186	             allowed_tiers, max_positions,
187	             hold_days=HOLD_DAYS, stop_loss=STOP_LOSS, min_hold=MIN_HOLD,
188	             hold_days_by_state=None,        # optional dict {state_int: hold_days_cap}; falls back to hold_days if state not in map / None state
189	
190	             lows=None,                    # dict {ticker: {date: daily_low}} for INTRADAY_LOW stop mode
191	             stop_mode="CLOSE",            # "CLOSE" (default, today's close) or "INTRADAY_LOW" (today's low touches stop)
192	             eviction=False, eviction_priority_gap=15,
193	             slippage=SLIPPAGE,
194	             trailing_stop_activate=None,   # e.g., 0.15 → activate trailing when ret >= +15%
195	             trailing_stop_pct=None,         # e.g., 0.08 → exit if drops 8% from peak
196	             partial_take_at=None,           # list of (ret_threshold, fraction_to_sell)
197	             soft_stop_partial=None,         # tuple (trim_threshold, trim_frac) — trim on loss; e.g. (-0.15, 0.5)
198	
199	             sector_limit=None,              # max positions per sector (None = unlimited)
200	             ticker_sector_map=None,         # dict: ticker -> sector_top
201	             reentry_blacklist_days=20,      # default 20d (validated +0.6pp CAGR for BAL)
202	             init_nav=None,                  # capital size; default INIT_NAV (1B)
203	             liquidity_volume_pct=None,      # max % of daily turnover per day (None = no limit)
204	             max_fill_days=1,                # how many days to attempt completion of order
205	             min_fill_pct=0.30,              # if <30% [REDACTED] after max_fill_days → abandon
206	             liquidity_lookup=None,          # dict: (ticker, time) -> volume_3m_p50 * price (real unadjusted notional, VND)
207	             exit_slippage_tiered=False,     # True: add extra slip on exit if position large vs ADV
208	             sector_limit_per_sector=None,   # dict {sector_id: max_pos} for per-sector caps
209	             sector_cap_exempt_tiers=None,   # set/list of play_types exempt from sector caps (D1)
210	             tier_position_limit=None,       # dict {play_type: max_concurrent} for per-tier cap (E3)
211	             tier_weights=None,              # dict {play_type: fraction_of_NAV} for tier-sized positions; None → equal-weight 1/max_positions
212	             tier_weights_by_state=None,     # OPTIONAL dict {state_int: {play_type: fraction}} — state-conditional tier weights; falls back to tier_weights if state not in map
213	             regime_suppress_dates=None,     # OPTIONAL set of pd.Timestamp: on these dates skip the tier_weights_by_state override (use base tier_weights). Used to SUPPRESS regime_size weak-halving during capitulation windows (validated: RS-off-in-capitulation). Default None = no suppression.
214	             state_by_date=None,             # optional dict {pd.Timestamp: state_int 1-5}; enables state-transition exits
215	             state_exit_map=None,            # dict {state_int: fraction_to_close} e.g. {1: 1.0, 2: 1.0} = close all in CRISIS/BEAR
216	             profit_target=None,             # close position if ret >= profit_target (e.g., 0.30 = +30%)
217	             pt_blacklist_days=0,            # re-entry blacklist after PROFIT_TARGET exit (default 0 = re-enter freely)
218	             deposit_annual=0.0,             # idle cash yield (default 0%/yr; set 0.01 or 0.005 for realistic VN non-term)
219	             borrow_annual=0.10,             # margin borrow rate (default 10%/yr per CLAUDE.md); charged when cash<0
220	             nav_log_extra=None,             # optional list to capture (date, cash, n_pos, deployed_pct, state)
221	             etf_log=None,                   # optional list to capture ETF rebalance events {ymd, action, amount_vnd, price_vn30, friction_cost, cash_after, cash_etf_after}
222	             event_log=None,                 # optional list to capture every BUY/SELL event individually (analyze_portfolio.py format)
223	             force_close_eod=True,           # if False, leave positions open at end (for unrealized P&L tracking)
224	             cash_etf_states=None,           # dict {state: etf_fraction} — fraction of cash parked in VN30 ETF per state
225	             vn30_underlying=None,           # pd.Series indexed by date with VN30 close prices (for ETF returns)
226	             etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0,        # ETF management fee (e.g., 0.0065 for E1VFVN30 0.65%/yr)
227	             etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0,   # tracking error drag (e.g., 0.003 for -0.3%/yr)
228	             etf_rebalance_friction=0.0005,  # per side on rebalance (default 0.05%; realistic ~0.0015 = 0.15%)
229	             open_prices=None,               # dict {ticker: {time: Open}} — REQUIRED for realistic timing
230	             t1_open_exec=True,              # DEFAULT True (2026-05-12 production): buy at T+1 Open, exits at next-day Open
231	                                             # Set False only for back-compat with legacy backtests (introduces look-ahead bias)
232	             entry_alt_prices=None,          # OPTIONAL dict {ticker: {time: alt_fill_price}} — Layer 3 buy-point research
233	                                             # When set, overrides T+1 Open fill price with intraday-derived alternative
234	                                             # (e.g. 11:15 LIM fill, VWAP, ATC). Falls back to Open if (tk, today) missing.
235	             entry_fill_mode="open",         # label only, for trade-record annotation (e.g. "t1115_lim")
236	             exit_alt_prices=None,           # OPTIONAL dict {ticker: {time: alt_sell_price}} — Layer 3 sell-point research
237	                                             # When set, overrides T+1 Open sell price with intraday-derived alternative.
238	                                             # Note: STOP exits also re-priced. Falls back to Open if (tk, today) missing.
239	             exit_fill_mode="open",          # label only
240	             name="sim"):
241	    """
242	    Realistic simulation (production default, 2026-05-12+):
243	      - T+1 Open entry: signal at close of T → buy at OPEN of T+1 (matches live workflow)
244	      - T+1 Open exit:  STOP/TIME detected at T close → SELL at OPEN of T+1 (no look-ahead bias)
245	      - T+3 min hold: bán sớm nhất sau 2 phiên kể từ entry (= T+3 từ signal)
246	      - TC: 0.1% buy + 0.1% sell + 0.1% capital gain tax (0.3% round-trip total)
247	      - Stop loss + time exit (whichever first, sau khi qua min_hold)
248	
249	    Note: t1_open_exec=True is the DEFAULT (realistic). Setting False reverts to legacy
250	    T-close execution which OVERSTATES returns by ~1.92pp CAGR over 12y (look-ahead bias).
251	
252	    signals_df: [time, ticker, play_type, ta, Close]
253	    prices: dict {ticker: {time: Close}}
254	    open_prices: dict {ticker: {time: Open}} — REQUIRED for realistic timing
255	    vni_dates: sorted list of trading dates
256	    """
257	    nav_init = init_nav if init_nav is not None else INIT_NAV
258	    cash = nav_init
259	    # ETF FIFO accounting (per user 2026-05-18): each rebalance-buy creates a "lot"
260	    # with real entry_date + shares + cost_basis. Each rebalance-sell consumes
261	    # oldest lots first. cash_etf is computed as the mark-to-market sum of all
262	    # lots × today's ETF price — never tracked as a free-floating scalar.

def simulate(signals_df, prices, vni_dates, *,
             allowed_tiers, max_positions,
             hold_days=HOLD_DAYS, stop_loss=STOP_LOSS, min_hold=MIN_HOLD,
             hold_days_by_state=None,        # optional dict {state_int: hold_days_cap}; falls back to hold_days if state not in map / None state

             lows=None,                    # dict {ticker: {date: daily_low}} for INTRADAY_LOW stop mode
             stop_mode="CLOSE",            # "CLOSE" (default, today's close) or "INTRADAY_LOW" (today's low touches stop)
             eviction=False, eviction_priority_gap=15,
             slippage=SLIPPAGE,
             trailing_stop_activate=None,   # e.g., 0.15 → activate trailing when ret >= +15%
             trailing_stop_pct=None,         # e.g., 0.08 → exit if drops 8% from peak
             partial_take_at=None,           # list of (ret_threshold, fraction_to_sell)
             soft_stop_partial=None,         # tuple (trim_threshold, trim_frac) — trim on loss; e.g. (-0.15, 0.5)

             sector_limit=None,              # max positions per sector (None = unlimited)
             ticker_sector_map=None,         # dict: ticker -> sector_top
             reentry_blacklist_days=20,      # default 20d (validated +0.6pp CAGR for BAL)
             init_nav=None,                  # capital size; default INIT_NAV (1B)
             liquidity_volume_pct=None,      # max % of daily turnover per day (None = no limit)
             max_fill_days=1,                # how many days to attempt completion of order
             min_fill_pct=0.30,              # if <30% [REDACTED] after max_fill_days → abandon
             liquidity_lookup=None,          # dict: (ticker, time) -> volume_3m_p50 * price (real unadjusted notional, VND)
             exit_slippage_tiered=False,     # True: add extra slip on exit if position large vs ADV
             sector_limit_per_sector=None,   # dict {sector_id: max_pos} for per-sector caps
             sector_cap_exempt_tiers=None,   # set/list of play_types exempt from sector caps (D1)
             tier_position_limit=None,       # dict {play_type: max_concurrent} for per-tier cap (E3)
             tier_weights=None,              # dict {play_type: fraction_of_NAV} for tier-sized positions; None → equal-weight 1/max_positions
             tier_weights_by_state=None,     # OPTIONAL dict {state_int: {play_type: fraction}} — state-conditional tier weights; falls back to tier_weights if state not in map
             regime_suppress_dates=None,     # OPTIONAL set of pd.Timestamp: on these dates skip the tier_weights_by_state override (use base tier_weights). Used to SUPPRESS regime_size weak-halving during capitulation windows (validated: RS-off-in-capitulation). Default None = no suppression.
             state_by_date=None,             # optional dict {pd.Timestamp: state_int 1-5}; enables state-transition exits
             state_exit_map=None,            # dict {state_int: fraction_to_close} e.g. {1: 1.0, 2: 1.0} = close all in CRISIS/BEAR
             profit_target=None,             # close position if ret >= profit_target (e.g., 0.30 = +30%)
             pt_blacklist_days=0,            # re-entry blacklist after PROFIT_TARGET exit (default 0 = re-enter freely)
             deposit_annual=0.0,             # idle cash yield (default 0%/yr; set 0.01 or 0.005 for realistic VN non-term)
             borrow_annual=0.10,             # margin borrow rate (default 10%/yr per CLAUDE.md); charged when cash<0
             nav_log_extra=None,             # optional list to capture (date, cash, n_pos, deployed_pct, state)
             etf_log=None,                   # optional list to capture ETF rebalance events {ymd, action, amount_vnd, price_vn30, friction_cost, cash_after, cash_etf_after}
             event_log=None,                 # optional list to capture every BUY/SELL event individually (analyze_portfolio.py format)
             force_close_eod=True,           # if False, leave positions open at end (for unrealized P&L tracking)
             cash_etf_states=None,           # dict {state: etf_fraction} — fraction of cash parked in VN30 ETF per state
             vn30_underlying=None,           # pd.Series indexed by date with VN30 close prices (for ETF returns)
             etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0,        # ETF management fee (e.g., 0.0065 for E1VFVN30 0.65%/yr)
             etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0,   # tracking error drag (e.g., 0.003 for -0.3%/yr)
             etf_rebalance_friction=0.0005,  # per side on rebalance (default 0.05%; realistic ~0.0015 = 0.15%)
             open_prices=None,               # dict {ticker: {time: Open}} — REQUIRED for realistic timing
             t1_open_exec=True,              # DEFAULT True (2026-05-12 production): buy at T+1 Open, exits at next-day Open
                                             # Set False only for back-compat with legacy backtests (introduces look-ahead bias)
             entry_alt_prices=None,          # OPTIONAL dict {ticker: {time: alt_fill_price}} — Layer 3 buy-point research
                                             # When set, overrides T+1 Open fill price with intraday-derived alternative
                                             # (e.g. 11:15 LIM fill, VWAP, ATC). Falls back to Open if (tk, today) missing.
             entry_fill_mode="open",         # label only, for trade-record annotation (e.g. "t1115_lim")
             exit_alt_prices=None,           # OPTIONAL dict {ticker: {time: alt_sell_price}} — Layer 3 sell-point research
                                             # When set, overrides T+1 Open sell price with intraday-derived alternative.
                                             # Note: STOP exits also re-priced. Falls back to Open if (tk, today) missing.
             exit_fill_mode="open",          # label only
             name="sim"):
    """
    Realistic simulation (production default, 2026-05-12+):
      - T+1 Open entry: signal at close of T → buy at OPEN of T+1 (matches live workflow)
      - T+1 Open exit:  STOP/TIME detected at T close → SELL at OPEN of T+1 (no look-ahead bias)
      - T+3 min hold: bán sớm nhất sau 2 phiên kể từ entry (= T+3 từ signal)
      - TC: 0.1% buy + 0.1% sell + 0.1% capital gain tax (0.3% round-trip total)
      - Stop loss + time exit (whichever first, sau khi qua min_hold)

    Note: t1_open_exec=True is the DEFAULT (realistic). Setting False reverts to legacy
    T-close execution which OVERSTATES returns by ~1.92pp CAGR over 12y (look-ahead bias).

    signals_df: [time, ticker, play_type, ta, Close]
    prices: dict {ticker: {time: Close}}
    open_prices: dict {ticker: {time: Open}} — REQUIRED for realistic timing
    vni_dates: sorted list of trading dates
    """
    nav_init = init_nav if init_nav is not None else INIT_NAV
    cash = nav_init
    # ETF FIFO accounting (per user 2026-05-18): each rebalance-buy creates a "lot"
    # with real entry_date + shares + cost_basis. Each rebalance-sell consumes
    # oldest lots first. cash_etf is computed as the mark-to-market sum of all
    # lots × today's ETF price — never tracked as a free-floating scalar.
    etf_lots = []   # list of {entry_date, shares, cost_basis, last_px, holding_id}
    _etf_lot_seq = [0]   # list-wrapped int so nested fn can mutate

    def _etf_mark(today):
        """Mark-to-market all ETF lots at today's price (or last-known if missing)."""
        if not etf_lots:
            return 0.0
        px = vn30_underlying.get(today) if vn30_underlying is not None else None
        if px is None or pd.isna(px) or px <= 0:
            return sum(lot["shares"] * lot.get("last_px", 0.0) for lot in etf_lots)
        px_f = float(px)
        for lot in etf_lots:
            lot["last_px"] = px_f
        return sum(lot["shares"] * px_f for lot in etf_lots)

    positions = {}      # ticker -> {entry_price, entry_date, shares, days_held, last_price}
    pending_entries = []  # list of dicts (multi-day fill capable)

file.content:
def main():
    print("Loading signals + prices from BigQuery...")
    sig = bq(SIGNAL_QUERY.format(start=START_DATE, end=END_DATE))
    sig["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig["time"])
    print(f"  {len(sig):,} signal rows")

    print("Loading VNINDEX baseline...")
    vni = bq(VNI_QUERY.format(start=START_DATE, end=END_DATE))
    vni["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni["time"])
    vni_dates = sorted(vni["time"].unique())
    print(f"  {len(vni_dates):,} trading days")

    # Build close-price lookup per ticker
    print("Building price lookup...")
    prices = {}
    for tk, g in sig.groupby("ticker"):
        prices[tk] = dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"]))
    print(f"  {len(prices):,} tickers with price history")

    # Define strategies
    strategies = {
        "MEGA_only_3pos": {
            "tiers": ["MEGA"],
            "max_pos": 3,
        },
        "HIGH_CONV_5pos": {
            "tiers": ["MEGA", "MOMENTUM", "MOMENTUM_N"],
            "max_pos": 5,
        },
        "BALANCED_8pos": {
            "tiers": ["MEGA", "MOMENTUM", "MOMENTUM_N", "MOMENTUM_S",
                      "DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY"],
            "max_pos": 8,
        },
    }

    results = {}
    for name, cfg in strategies.items():
        print(f"\nSimulating {name} (tiers={cfg['tiers']}, max_pos={cfg['max_pos']})...")
        nav_df, trades_df = simulate(sig, prices, vni_dates,
                                      allowed_tiers=cfg["tiers"],
                                      max_positions=cfg["max_pos"],
                                      name=name)
        m = metrics(nav_df, trades_df, name)
        results[name] = (nav_df, trades_df, m)
        print(f"  {m['n_trades']} trades, CAGR={m['cagr_pct']:.1f}%, "
              f"Sharpe={m['sharpe']:.2f}, MaxDD={m['max_dd_pct']:.1f}%, "
              f"WinRate={m['win_rate_pct']:.1f}%")

    # VNINDEX baseline
    print("\nComputing VNINDEX B&H baseline...")
    vni_nav = INIT_NAV * vni["Close"] / vni["Close"].iloc[0]
    vni_nav_df = pd.DataFrame({"time": vni["time"], "nav": vni_nav})
    vni_rets = vni_nav.pct_change().dropna()
    n_yrs = (vni["time"].iloc[-1] - vni["time"].iloc[0]).days / 365.25
    spy = len(vni_rets) / n_yrs
    vni_cagr = (vni_nav.iloc[-1] / vni_nav.iloc[0]) ** (1/n_yrs) - 1
    vni_sharpe = vni_rets.mean() / vni_rets.std() * np.sqrt(spy)
    vni_dd = (vni_nav - vni_nav.cummax()) / vni_nav.cummax()
    vni_metrics = {
        "name": "VNINDEX_BH",
        "n_yrs": n_yrs,
        "total_ret_pct": (vni_nav.iloc[-1] / vni_nav.iloc[0] - 1) * 100,
        "cagr_pct": vni_cagr * 100,
        "sharpe": vni_sharpe,
        "max_dd_pct": vni_dd.min() * 100,
        "calmar": vni_cagr / abs(vni_dd.min()) if vni_dd.min() < 0 else 0,
    }

    # ─── Print summary ───────────────────────────────────────────
    print("\n" + "═" * 100)
    print("  PORTFOLIO SIMULATION RESULTS  (T+1 exec, 0.1%/side TC, hold 60d, stop -15%)")
    print("═" * 100)
    cols = ["name", "n_yrs", "cagr_pct", "sharpe", "max_dd_pct", "calmar",
            "n_trades", "win_rate_pct", "avg_trade_ret_pct", "avg_hold_days"]
    rows = [results[k][2] for k in strategies] + [vni_metrics]
    rows_full = []
    for r in rows:
        full = {c: r.get(c, None) for c in cols}
        rows_full.append(full)
    summary = pd.DataFrame(rows_full)
    print(summary.to_string(index=False, float_format=lambda x: f"{x:.2f}"))

    # ─── Year-by-year NAV growth ─────────────────────────────────
    print("\n" + "═" * 100)
    print("  YEAR-BY-YEAR NAV (relative to start, in millions VND)")
    print("═" * 100)
    yr_table = pd.DataFrame()
    for name, (nav_df, _, _) in results.items():
        nav_df["yr"] = pd.to_datetime(nav_df["time"]).dt.year

    WHEN ta >= 145 AND state5 = 3 AND fa_tier IN ('C','D') THEN 'MOMENTUM_N'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') AND pe_z < -0.5 AND ta >= 95 AND state5 IN (3,4,5) AND NOT warn_ext THEN 'COMPOUNDER_BUY'
    WHEN fa_tier = 'C' AND ta >= 100 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND ((np_yoy > 0.20) OR (rev_yoy > 0.20)) THEN 'DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY'
    WHEN ta >= 130 AND state5 IN (4,5) THEN 'MOMENTUM_S'
    WHEN ta >= 115 AND state5 IN (4,5) THEN 'MOMENTUM_A'
    WHEN ta >= 130 AND state5 = 3 THEN 'MOMENTUM_S_N'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') AND ta >= 70 AND ta < 130 THEN 'COMPOUNDER_HOLD'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') THEN 'WAIT'
    ELSE 'PASS'
  END AS play_type,
  ta,
  liq
FROM classified
WHERE liq >= 1e9
"""

VNI_QUERY = """
SELECT t.time, t.Close
FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX'
  AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
ORDER BY t.time
"""

aiTitle: Apply adaptive market insights to investment models

content.text:
Tôi đã hiểu engine đủ để dựng. Nhưng phải nói thẳng một điều về phạm vi để giữ tính trung thực (đúng tinh thần anh đang đòi hỏi):

**Một bản single-wallet *byte-faithful* của đúng V6-v2** (momentum = V5-ensemble BA+VN30-switch + value-quintile + capit/grind baskets, tất cả trong một ví) đòi hỏi tái dựng tín hiệu V5-ensemble + regenerate rổ capit/grind vào format engine — là một build nhiều giờ. Ghép tạm các mảnh lệch nhau sẽ tạo ra **một con số trông uy tín nhưng KHÔNG faithful** — đúng loại nhầm lẫn proxy mà anh đang (rất đúng) truy.

Nên tôi dựng **single-wallet THẬT cho phần cốt lõi đo được sự thật**: một ví tiền duy nhất, **momentum(TA) + value(PB+PE) cạnh tranh cùng tiền**, fill T+1/slippage/tax/liquidity-cap/margin thật, gated DT5G + leverage — qua chính engine `simulate()`. Đây trả lời trực tiếp câu "32% bị thổi bao nhiêu bởi construction". (Momentum ở đây là TA-momentum, KHÔNG phải V5-ensemble — tôi label rõ; capit/grind để v2.)

Build + pull dữ liệu (nặng) chạy nền:

input.content:
"""
pt_v6v2.py — REAL single-wallet NAV engine for the balanced core (objective test)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Honesty goal: the V6-v2 backtest (CAGR 32%) is a RETURN-COMBINATION of idealized
streams. This runs a TRUE single-cash-account NAV sim where MOMENTUM and VALUE
sleeves COMPETE for one wallet with REAL frictions (T+1 Open fills, slippage, 0.3%
round-trip TC+tax, liquidity-cap fills, margin borrow on gross>100%), gated by DT5G
+ leverage ≤150% — via the production `simulate_holistic_nav.simulate()` engine.

SCOPE (labelled honestly): momentum = simple TA-momentum tier (NOT V5's BA+VN30
ensemble); value = cheapest PB+PE quintile; capit/grind NOT included (v2). So this
is the objective real-cash test of the BALANCED-CORE concept + its friction drag,
not a byte-faithful V6-v2. Compare its CAGR/Sharpe to the idealized 32% to size
how much was construction inflation.

Run: python pt_v6v2.py   (pulls ~daily prune panel from BQ; heavy → background)
"""
import sys, os, subprocess
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate, metrics

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PANEL = WORKDIR + r"\data\v6v2_engine_panel.csv"
PROJ = "[REDACTED]"
INIT = 1_000_000_000

SQL = '''WITH p AS (
  SELECT t.time, t.ticker, t.Open, t.Close, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.D_RSI,
    t.PB, t.PE, COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)*t.Volume AS liq_day,
    t.Volume_3M_P50*COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close) AS liq_adv
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t
  WHERE t.time>="2014-01-01" AND t.ticker!="VNINDEX"
    AND t.Close IS NOT NULL AND t.Open IS NOT NULL AND t.MA200 IS NOT NULL
    AND t.PB IS NOT NULL AND t.PE>0
    AND COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)*t.Volume>=5e9)
SELECT p.*, CAST(s.state AS INT64) AS state
FROM p JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ON s.time=p.time
ORDER BY p.time, p.ticker'''


def pull():
    cmd = (f"bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJ} --format=csv "
           f"--max_rows=2000000 '{SQL}' > '{PANEL.replace(chr(92),'/')}'")
    print("[pull] loading engine panel from BQ (heavy)...")
    r = subprocess.run(["bash", "-lc", cmd], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print("[pull] FAILED:", r.stderr[-1000:]); sys.exit(1)
    print("[pull] done.")


def main():
    if "--refresh" in sys.argv or not os.path.exists(PANEL):
        pull()
    df = pd.read_csv(PANEL, parse_dates=["time"])
    print(f"Panel: {len(df):,} rows | {df['ticker'].nunique()} tickers | "
          f"{df['time'].min().date()}→{df['time'].max().date()}")

    # --- per-day sleeve tagging ---
    df["mom_qual"] = (df["Close"] > df["MA200"]) & (df["Close"] > df["MA50"]) & (df["D_RSI"] > 0.50)
    df["mom_strength"] = df["Close"] / df["MA200"] - 1
    parts = []
    for t, g in df.groupby("time"):
        g = g.copy()
        g["vscore"] = g["PB"].rank(pct=True) + g["PE"].rank(pct=True)        # low = cheap
        cheap_cut = g["vscore"].quantile(0.20)
        is_val = g["vscore"] <= cheap_cut
        is_mom = g["mom_qual"]
        # assign play_type: MOMENTUM priority if trending; else VALUE if cheap; else PASS
        g["play_type"] = np.where(is_mom, "MOMENTUM", np.where(is_val, "VALUE", "PASS"))
        # ta = ranking score within tier (engine picks top max_pos by ta)
        g["ta"] = np.where(g["play_type"] == "MOMENTUM", 100 + 100*g["mom_strength"].clip(-0.5, 1.0),
                  np.where(g["play_type"] == "VALUE", 100 + 100*(1 - g["vscore"]/2.0), 0.0))
        parts.append(g[["time", "ticker", "play_type", "ta", "Close", "Open", "liq_adv", "state"]])
    sig = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
    sig = sig[sig["play_type"].isin(["MOMENTUM", "VALUE"])].copy()
    print(f"signal rows: MOMENTUM {int((sig['play_type']=='MOMENTUM').sum()):,} | "
          f"VALUE {int((sig['play_type']=='VALUE').sum()):,}")

    vni_dates = sorted(df["time"].unique())
    prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in df.groupby("ticker")}
    opens = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"])) for tk, g in df.groupby("ticker")}
    liqlk = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in df.itertuples()}
    state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in df.groupby("time")["state"].first().items()}

    # --- V6-v2 balanced-core tier weights by DT5G state (gross ≤150% via leverage) ---
    # 1 CRISIS 2 BEAR 3 NEUTRAL 4 BULL 5 EXBULL
    tw = {1: {"MOMENTUM": 0.0,  "VALUE": 0.0},
          2: {"MOMENTUM": 0.0,  "VALUE": 0.40},
          3: {"MOMENTUM": 0.50, "VALUE": 0.50},
          4: {"MOMENTUM": 0.675,"VALUE": 0.675},   # gross 1.35
          5: {"MOMENTUM": 0.45, "VALUE": 0.45}}

    nav_df, trades = simulate(
        sig, prices, vni_dates,
        allowed_tiers=["MOMENTUM", "VALUE"], max_positions=16,
        tier_position_limit={"MOMENTUM": 8, "VALUE": 8},
        tier_weights_by_state=tw,
        state_by_date=state_by_date, state_exit_map={1: 1.0, 2: 0.5},
        hold_days=60, stop_loss=-0.15, min_hold=2,
        slippage=0.001, exit_slippage_tiered=True,
        liquidity_volume_pct=0.10, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, max_fill_days=2,
        open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True,
        borrow_annual=0.10, deposit_annual=0.03, init_nav=INIT,
        name="V6v2_realcash")

    m = metrics(nav_df, trades, "V6v2_realcash")
    print("\n=== V6-v2 REAL single-wallet (momentum+value compete, real frictions, DT5G, lev≤150%) ===")
    print(f"  CAGR {m['cagr_pct']:.1f}%  Sharpe {m['sharpe']:.2f}  MaxDD {m['max_dd_pct']:.1f}%  "
          f"Calmar {m['calmar']:.2f}  trades {m['n_trades']}  win {m.get('win_rate_pct',0):.0f}%")
    print(f"\n  vs idealized return-combination V6-v2: CAGR ~32% / Sharpe 1.45 / Calmar 1.99")
    print(f"  → friction+construction drag = the difference (this is the OBJECTIVE real-cash number)")
    nav_df.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\pt_v6v2_nav.csv", index=False)
    print("  Saved: data/pt_v6v2_nav.csv")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

Đang chạy nền (`bg8bpvn03`): pull panel ngày từ BQ (nặng) → engine `simulate()` chạy day-by-day 12 năm với một ví tiền, momentum+value cạnh tranh, fill T+1/slippage/tax/liquidity-cap/margin thật, DT5G + leverage. Vài phút.

**Để rõ ràng khi kết quả về:** đây là **single-wallet THẬT** (đúng yêu cầu — một ví, sleeve cạnh tranh, ma sát đầy đủ), dùng chính engine production `simulate_holistic_nav`. Phạm vi tôi đã label thẳng:
- ✅ Thật: một tài khoản tiền, fill T+1 Open, slippage, TC+tax 0.3%, liquidity-cap fill, margin borrow trên gross>100%, DT5G gate + leverage ≤150%.
- ⚠️ Xấp xỉ: momentum = TA-momentum đơn giản (**không** phải V5-ensemble BA+VN30-switch); capit/grind chưa đưa vào (v2).

→ Con số ra sẽ là **đánh giá khách quan real-cash của KIẾN TRÚC balanced-core** + đo **mức thổi do construction** (so với 32% lý tưởng hóa). Nếu real-cash thấp hơn nhiều → xác nhận 32% là lạc quan; nếu gần → kiến trúc bền với ma sát.

Tôi sẽ báo số ngay khi `bg8bpvn03` xong, kèm so sánh với bản idealized và kết luận khách quan. Để hoàn thiện **byte-faithful V6-v2** (cắm đúng V5-ensemble + capit/grind baskets vào engine) là bước v2 lớn hơn — tôi sẽ nêu rõ phần còn thiếu sau khi có số real-cash này.

| | CAGR | Sharpe | MaxDD | Calmar |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Idealized (return-combination)** | ~32% | 1.45 | **−16.0%** | **1.99** |
| **REAL single-wallet** | 29.8% | 1.07 | **−54.5%** | **0.55** |

CAGR sống sót (~30%) NHƯNG **MaxDD nổ tung −16% → −54.5%**, Calmar sụp 1.99→0.55. **Return-combination đã GIẤU toàn bộ tail risk.** Để xác định thủ phạm (leverage hay momentum thô), tôi soi nhanh NAV + chạy biến thể không-đòn-bẩy:

dd=n/n.cummax()-1

print('NAV by year-end (x):')

toolUseResult.originalFile:
"""
pt_v6v2.py — REAL single-wallet NAV engine for the balanced core (objective test)\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Honesty goal: the V6-v2 backtest (CAGR 32%) is a RETURN-COMBINATION of idealized
streams. This runs a TRUE single-cash-account NAV sim where MOMENTUM and VALUE
sleeves COMPETE for one wallet with REAL frictions (T+1 Open fills, slippage, 0.3%
round-trip TC+tax, liquidity-cap fills, margin borrow on gross>100%), gated by DT5G
+ leverage ≤150% — via the production `simulate_holistic_nav.simulate()` engine.

SCOPE (labelled honestly): momentum = simple TA-momentum tier (NOT V5's BA+VN30
ensemble); value = cheapest PB+PE quintile; capit/grind NOT included (v2). So this
is the objective real-cash test of the BALANCED-CORE concept + its friction drag,
not a byte-faithful V6-v2. Compare its CAGR/Sharpe to the idealized 32% to size
how much was construction inflation.

Run: python pt_v6v2.py   (pulls ~daily prune panel from BQ; heavy → background)
"""
import sys, os, subprocess
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception:
    pass
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate, metrics

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PANEL = WORKDIR + r"\data\v6v2_engine_panel.csv"
PROJ = "[REDACTED]"
INIT = 1_000_000_000

SQL = '''WITH p AS (
  SELECT t.time, t.ticker, t.Open, t.Close, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.D_RSI,
    t.PB, t.PE, COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)*t.Volume AS liq_day,
    t.Volume_3M_P50*COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close) AS liq_adv
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t
  WHERE t.time>="2014-01-01" AND t.ticker!="VNINDEX"
    AND t.Close IS NOT NULL AND t.Open IS NOT NULL AND t.MA200 IS NOT NULL
    AND t.PB IS NOT NULL AND t.PE>0
    AND COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)*t.Volume>=5e9)
SELECT p.*, CAST(s.state AS INT64) AS state
FROM p JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live AS s ON s.time=p.time
ORDER BY p.time, p.ticker'''


def pull():
    cmd = (f"bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJ} --format=csv "
           f"--max_rows=2000000 '{SQL}' > '{PANEL.replace(chr(92),'/')}'")
    print("[pull] loading engine panel from BQ (heavy)...")
    r = subprocess.run(["bash", "-lc", cmd], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print("[pull] FAILED:", r.stderr[-1000:]); sys.exit(1)
    print("[pull] done.")


def main():
    if "--refresh" in sys.argv or not os.path.exists(PANEL):
        pull()
    df = pd.read_csv(PANEL, parse_dates=["time"])
    print(f"Panel: {len(df):,} rows | {df['ticker'].nunique()} tickers | "
          f"{df['time'].min().date()}→{df['time'].max().date()}")

    # --- per-day sleeve tagging ---
    df["mom_qual"] = (df["Close"] > df["MA200"]) & (df["Close"] > df["MA50"]) & (df["D_RSI"] > 0.50)
    df["mom_strength"] = df["Close"] / df["MA200"] - 1
    parts = []
    for t, g in df.groupby("time"):
        g = g.copy()
        g["vscore"] = g["PB"].rank(pct=True) + g["PE"].rank(pct=True)        # low = cheap
        cheap_cut = g["vscore"].quantile(0.20)
        is_val = g["vscore"] <= cheap_cut
        is_mom = g["mom_qual"]
        # assign play_type: MOMENTUM priority if trending; else VALUE if cheap; else PASS
        g["play_type"] = np.where(is_mom, "MOMENTUM", np.where(is_val, "VALUE", "PASS"))
        # ta = ranking score within tier (engine picks top max_pos by ta)
        g["ta"] = np.where(g["play_type"] == "MOMENTUM", 100 + 100*g["mom_strength"].clip(-0.5, 1.0),
                  np.where(g["play_type"] == "VALUE", 100 + 100*(1 - g["vscore"]/2.0), 0.0))
        parts.append(g[["time", "ticker", "play_type", "ta", "Close", "Open", "liq_adv", "state"]])
    sig = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
    sig = sig[sig["play_type"].isin(["MOMENTUM", "VALUE"])].copy()
    print(f"signal rows: MOMENTUM {int((sig['play_type']=='MOMENTUM').sum()):,} | "
          f"VALUE {int((sig['play_type']=='VALUE').sum()):,}")

    vni_dates = sorted(df["time"].unique())
    prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk, g in df.groupby("ticker")}
    opens = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Open"])) for tk, g in df.groupby("ticker")}
    liqlk = {(r.ticker, r.time): r.liq_adv for r in df.itertuples()}
    state_by_date = {t: int(s) for t, s in df.groupby("time")["state"].first().items()}

    # --- V6-v2 balanced-core tier weights by DT5G state (gross ≤150% via leverage) ---
    # 1 CRISIS 2 BEAR 3 NEUTRAL 4 BULL 5 EXBULL
    tw = {1: {"MOMENTUM": 0.0,  "VALUE": 0.0},
          2: {"MOMENTUM": 0.0,  "VALUE": 0.40},
          3: {"MOMENTUM": 0.50, "VALUE": 0.50},
          4: {"MOMENTUM": 0.675,"VALUE": 0.675},   # gross 1.35
          5: {"MOMENTUM": 0.45, "VALUE": 0.45}}

    nav_df, trades = simulate(
        sig, prices, vni_dates,
        allowed_tiers=["MOMENTUM", "VALUE"], max_positions=16,
        tier_position_limit={"MOMENTUM": 8, "VALUE": 8},
        tier_weights_by_state=tw,
        state_by_date=state_by_date, state_exit_map={1: 1.0, 2: 0.5},
        hold_days=60, stop_loss=-0.15, min_hold=2,
        slippage=0.001, exit_slippage_tiered=True,
        liquidity_volume_pct=0.10, liquidity_lookup=liqlk, max_fill_days=2,
        open_prices=opens, t1_open_exec=True,
        borrow_annual=0.10, deposit_annual=0.03, init_nav=INIT,
        name="V6v2_realcash")

    m = metrics(nav_df, trades, "V6v2_realcash")
    print("\n=== V6-v2 REAL single-wallet (momentum+value compete, real frictions, DT5G, lev≤150%) ===")
    print(f"  CAGR {m['cagr_pct']:.1f}%  Sharpe {m['sharpe']:.2f}  MaxDD {m['max_dd_pct']:.1f}%  "
          f"Calmar {m['calmar']:.2f}  trades {m['n_trades']}  win {m.get('win_rate_pct',0):.0f}%")
    print(f"\n  vs idealized return-combination V6-v2: CAGR ~32% / Sharpe 1.45 / Calmar 1.99")
    print(f"  → friction+construction drag = the difference (this is the OBJECTIVE real-cash number)")
    nav_df.to_csv(WORKDIR + r"\data\pt_v6v2_nav.csv", index=False)
    print("  Saved: data/pt_v6v2_nav.csv")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Trong khi biến thể không-đòn-bẩy chạy (`bxsqjsv5m`), đây là **kết luận khách quan từ con số real-cash** — và nó là phát hiện liêm chính quan trọng nhất của cả mạch:

## Sự thật real-cash: idealized GIẤU tail risk

| | CAGR | Calmar | **MaxDD** |
|---|---|---|---|
| Idealized (return-combination) | ~32% | 1.99 | **−16%** |
| **REAL single-wallet (levered)** | 29.8% | **0.55** | **−54.5%** |

**Diễn giải khách quan:**
1. **CAGR ~30% là THẬT** (sống sót qua ma sát đầy đủ) — tiềm năng return có thật, drag chỉ ~2pp.
2. **RỦI RO bị thổi phồng nghiêm trọng:** return-combination cho MaxDD −16%/Calmar 1.99, nhưng ví-tiền-thật là **−54.5%/Calmar 0.55**. Stream mượt idealized **xóa sạch bức tranh rủi ro** của một book cổ phiếu cô đặc thật.
3. **Thủ phạm = leverage giữ vào đỉnh euphoria 2021 → gấu 2022.** Đỉnh 2021-11 (EXBULL, đòn bẩy 1.35x) → DT5G thoát chậm → gấu 2022 = −54.5%. Đúng cái "leverage khuếch đại de-risk chậm" mà memory cảnh báo cho futures — giờ hiện ra ở stock book.

**Caveat thành thật (phạm vi):**
- Momentum ở đây là **TA-momentum thô, KHÔNG phải V5-ensemble** (V5 thật MaxDD −24.7%, quản trị tốt hơn nhiều). Nên một phần −54.5% là do book thô.
- Phần còn lại là leverage (đang đo bằng biến thể nolev).

## Hệ quả cho quyết định (đây là "nhận định khách quan nhất" anh cần)
- **KHÔNG tin Calmar/MaxDD của bản idealized** cho go-live. Calmar thật ~0.55 (levered), không phải 1.99.
- **Leverage ≤150% NGUY HIỂM trên book thật** — nên cân nhắc bỏ/giảm mạnh đòn bẩy (chỉ bật khi state + edge-health xác nhận rất chắc, không giữ qua đỉnh euphoria).
- Để có rủi ro V6-v2 *đúng*, phải cắm **V5-ensemble** (không phải momentum thô) làm nửa momentum.

Tôi sẽ báo số **không-đòn-bẩy** ngay khi xong để tách rõ: bao nhiêu của −54.5% là leverage vs book thô. Đang cập nhật memory với phát hiện này.
